1100707701.english: First, let's finish cleaning the chapel.

1100707702.english: Is this the barracks of Anger of the Horde?

1100707703.english: Should I meet the Swift Khan, the leader of the army?

1100707705.english: She has nothing to do with it at all.

1100707707.english: Hey? Aren't you the archangels of Kohei?

1100707708.english: What's going on in Anger of the Horde?

1100707710.english: I came to see you today because I have business with you.

1100707713.english: Would you like some secret footage of the Commander?

1100707715.english: ...... Lets talk about that later in secret.

1100707717.english: Do you remember when I was volunteering at Yeongchang last time, I was interested in the things you had?
1100707717.korean: 제가 지난 번에 영창에서 봉사활동을 할 때 당신이 가진 물건들에 흥미를 가졌던 것을 기억하시나요?

1100707718.english: Oh, of course. Are you talking about Captain Khan's goods?
1100707718.korean: 아. 물론이죠. 칸 대장님 굿즈들 말씀하시는 거죠?

1100707719.english: Do you need it? How much? What kind? Quantity? Can you give me a catalog?
1100707719.korean: 혹시 필요 하신가요? 얼마나? 종류는? 수량은? 카탈로그 드려요?

1100707721.english: Oh, it's not that I don't like Captain Khan.
1100707721.korean: 아, 칸 대장님이 싫다는 건 아니고.

1100707722.english: Just like when I made Captain Khan goods…

1100707723.english: Ban-Rl - I want to make things related to the Savior.
1100707723.korean: 반ㄹ- 구원자와 관련된 물건들을 만들고 싶어서요.

1100707726.english: It's not impossible, but it would require new equipment depending on resources and supplies?
1100707726.korean: 불가능하지는 않지만 리소스랑 물품에 따라 새로운 설비가 필요한데요?

1100707727.english: Resources are readily available… but what about equipment?
1100707727.korean: 리소스는 얼마든지 구할 수 있는데… 설비요?

1100707728.english: Yes. What kind of item are you trying to make?

1100707729.english: Photo cards, key rings, photo albums, prayers in the voice of the Savior, jewelry with pictures, religious paintings, statues, romance novels with the Savior as the main character, and also-
1100707729.korean: 포토 카드, 키링, 사진첩, 구원자의 음성으로 된 기도문, 사진이 들어간 장신구, 종교화, 조각상, 구원자가 주인공인 연애소설 그리고 또-

1100707732.english: Some items may still be available for ordering now.

1100707733.english: Some items, as I mentioned earlier, will require new equipment.
1100707733.korean: 몇몇 물품은 앞서 말씀드렸던 것처럼 새로운 설비가 필요하겠네요.

1100707734.english: It's okay to ask the technical team to build the equipment, but that would be like asking for more money than benefits.
1100707734.korean: 기술팀에게 설비를 만들어달라고 해도 상관없지만 그러면 배보다 배꼽이 더 크고.

1100707735.english: Hmm... It would be faster to bring in equipment from an old factory.
1100707735.korean: 음… 옛 시대의 공장에서 설비를 가져오는 쪽이 빠르겠네요.

1100707736.english: Could you tell me where the factory is located?
1100707736.korean: 혹시 공장의 위치를 알 수 있을까요?

1100707737.english: Just a moment. It should be on the map I made while fighting guerrilla warfare in the past…
1100707737.korean: 잠시만요. 옛날에 게릴라전을 하면서 만들었던 지도에 있을텐데…

1100707738.english: Ah, there it is. Not far from here.
1100707738.korean: 아. 있네요. 여기서 멀지 않은 곳에.

1100707739.english: I'll send it to Azazel's account.

1100707741.english: What? I also owe it to Yeongchang.

1100707742.english: But you have to be careful. There is a high chance of battles breaking out in this factory, as it still has defense facilities.
1100707742.korean: 하지만 조심하셔야겠네요. 아직 방위 시설이 남아있는 공장이라 전투가 일어날 확률이 높아요.

1100707743.english: Then I guess I'll have to step forward.

1100707744.english: As the Judge of the Church and the sharpest sword of the Savior, I will remove anything that blocks our path.
1100707744.korean: 교단의 심판자이자 구원자의 가장 날카로운 검인 내가 우리의 앞길을 가로막는 것들을 제거하겠다.

1100707747.english: To spread the teachings of light far and wide!

1100707750.english: Of course. Even if you can't always have your pet with you, you can keep things that remind you of them.
1100707750.korean: 물론이죠. 반려와 늘 함께하지 못해도 반려를 떠올릴 수 있는 물건들을 곁에 둘 수 있는 걸요.

1100707751.english: Now you don't even hide your selfish intentions.

1100707755.english: And it doesn't end with satisfying selfish desires, but it also helps expand the church and finances, so there's nothing bad about it.
1100707755.korean: 그리고 사심을 채우는 것으로 끝나지 않고 교세 확대에도, 재정에도 도움이 되는 일이니 나쁠 일은 없겠지.

1100707757.english: What are these piles of boxes?

1100707762.english: I had a hard time finding the equipment to make this figure.
1100707762.korean: 이 피규어를 만드는 설비를 구하느라 고생 좀 했지.

1100707764.english: But it was worth the effort, right?

1100707766.english: In addition to this, many religious items of the Savior were ordered.
1100707766.korean: 이것 외에도 많은 구원자의 종교물품들을 발주했다.

1100707767.english: We've used up next year's budget for the order, but we'll be able to turn a profit in no time. And if we just have these, our Kohei school will be able to secure an unrivaled position in Orca.
1100707767.korean: 발주에 내년 예산까지 끌어다썼지만 금방 흑자로 돌아설 수 있을거다. 그리고 이것들만 있으면 우리 코헤이 교는 오르카에서 독보적인 위치를 확보할 수 있겠지.

1100707768.english: Veronica, do you have any religious items you want?
1100707768.korean: 베로니카, 너도 원하는 굿ㅈ- 종교물품이 있나?

1100707772.english: Aren't these items related to the Savior?

1100707773.english: These are not personal items, but religious items officially displayed by the Kohei Church.
1100707773.korean: 개인 소장품이 아니라 코헤이 교에서 공식으로 낼 종교 물품들.

1100707779.english: What else have you ordered besides these!

1100707782.english: Oh my, why did you order so much?

1100707783.english: I have to go back and forth to Kohei all day today.
1100707783.korean: 오늘 하루 종일 코헤이에 왔다갔다 해야하잖아.

1100707784.english: This is all for this delivery.

1100707789.english: ...... The Saviors goods are privately owned and handmade or produced in small quantities, so we turn a blind eye to them… but for such large-scale, collective production… a permit is required.
1100707789.korean: ……구원자님 굿즈는 개인소장으로 수제 혹은 소규모 생산은 눈감아주지만… 이렇게 대규모로, 집단에서 생산하는 건… 허가가 필요합니다.

1100707790.english: ...... They also sell companion goods at the shrine?

1100707792.english: Can't you get permission after the fact?

1100707793.english: I also looked into it because the shrine was selling items related to the Savior…
1100707793.korean: 저도 신사에서 구원자님 관련 물건을 팔길래 조사했습니다…

1100707794.english: Because the regulations are strict, such as using only designated resources, and there are budgetary issues… I was deliberately making a long-term plan…
1100707794.korean: 지정된 리소스만 쓰는 등 규정이 까다롭고, 예산 문제도 있어서… 일부러 장기적인 플랜을 세우고 있었는데…

1100707795.english: Have you used the specified resource?

1100707796.english: ...... No. I didn't even know it existed.

1100707797.english: ...... You said you were using up next years budget?

1100707800.english: There are still a few more left, so see you later!
1100707800.korean: 아직 몇 번 더 남았으니까 또 봐!

1100707802.english: Lord Azazel, Lord Saraqael. Thank you for your help so far.
1100707802.korean: 아자젤 님, 사라카엘 님. 지금까지 신세 많이 졌습니다.

1100707803.english: Even though I convert, I will never forget the memories of you two.
1100707803.korean: 비록 개종하더라도 두 분에 대한 추억은 잊지 않겠습니다.

1100707805.english: Without you, the church can't function properly!
1100707805.korean: 네가 없으면 교단이 제대로 돌아가지 않는다!

1100707807.korean: (반은 농담이라는 말은 반은 진담이라는 말 아닌가요?)

1100707808.english: (Shh! If you point that out, it becomes completely serious.)

1100707809.english: I can't leave the church and leave Angel and Ramiel behind, who have done nothing wrong.
1100707809.korean: 아무런 잘못도 안 하신 엔젤 님과 라미엘 님을 두고 교단을 떠날 수는 없지요.

1100707812.english: There's only one way I can think of.
1100707812.korean: 제가 떠올릴 수 있는 방법은 하나뿐입니다.

1100707813.english: There is no choice but to obtain permission for these goods after the fact.
1100707813.korean: 이 굿즈들을 사후 허가 받는 수 밖에요.

1100707814.english: After distinguishing between what can and cannot be approved posthumously, let's make sure that only those things that can be approved are approved.
1100707814.korean: 사후 허가 받을 수 있는 것, 없는 것을 구분한 후에 허가 받을 수 있는 것만이라도 허가 받도록 하지요.

1100707816.english: When the Savior returns, I will ask for permission from the Savior.
1100707816.korean: 구원자님께서 귀환하시면 구원자님께 허가를 받도록 하지요.

1100707821.english: Because I am an agent who is doing this.

1100707822.english: Then move all the boxes to the warehouse!

1100707823.english: Because if the goods are released into the market before permission is granted, it will be impossible to recover!
1100707823.korean: 혹여 허가 받기 전에 굿즈들이 시중에 풀리면 수습이 안되니까요!

1100707825.english: I believe that you will never be a slacker again in the future.
1100707825.korean: 앞으로는 땡땡이는 절대로 안 치실 거라 믿겠습니다.

1100707829.english: Oh my! There are so many!

1100707830.english: Are you having some kind of event? Judging by the number of orders you've received.
1100707830.korean: 무슨 행사라도 하나봐? 이렇게 주문한 게 많은 걸 보면.

1100707831.english: There's still a lot left, so look forward to it!

1100707833.english: Oh! Are you confident in our Duelist Yang?
1100707833.korean: 오! 우리 듀얼리스트 양 자신 있나봐?

1100707834.english: I can't lose either. I raise too!
1100707834.korean: 나도 질 수 없지. 나도 레이즈!

1100707841.english: I feel chills to my stomach as I watch the duelist Yang advance.
1100707841.korean: 듀얼리스트 양의 진격에 오히려 내가 간담이 서늘해지는데?

1100707843.english: I like it too… but I don't think its as strong as our Duelist Yang…
1100707843.korean: 나도 좋기는 한데… 우리 듀얼리스트 양만큼 강한 패는 아닌 거 같기도 하고…

1100707845.english: ... ...If you avoid the game, the gambler's name will cry!

1100707847.english: ...... Then shall we check the pattern?

1100707848.english: It looks like both Duelists' bodies are on fire.

1100707849.english: Then we need to make it cool!

1100707851.english: Wow, this is a fandom that I find hard to find, but it's out now.
1100707851.korean: 캬아, 나도 보기 힘든 팬데 이게 지금 나오네.

1100707852.english: What do you think of our duelist Yang's pattern?

1100707860.english: Yeah, that's really weird. It's supposed to be Q top, right?
1100707860.korean: 그러게요, 참 이상한 일이네요. 원래는 Q 탑이 나와야 하는데 말이죠?

1100707862.english: These cards actually have a secret marking on the back, right?
1100707862.korean: 이 카드들 사실 뒷면에 은밀하게 표시 되어 있죠?

1100707864.english: She continued to gamble with this.

1100707865.english: I knew that Ms. Salamander was a gambler, and that she would stop at nothing to win.
1100707865.korean: 샐러맨더 씨가 승부사라는 것은 알고 있었고, 이기기 위해서는 수단과 방법을 안 가린다는 것도 알고 있었어요.

1100707866.english: But I thought this was just a way of life as a gambler, so I turned a blind eye to it until now. I couldn't even find a method.
1100707866.korean: 하지만 이것도 승부사로서의 삶의 방식이라고 생각하고 지금까지 눈감고 있었어요. 수법도 못 찾았고요.

1100707868.english: And you keep using the same method. I even discovered the method and was able to set a trap in reverse.
1100707868.korean: 그리고 같은 수법을 계속 쓰시구요. 저도 수법을 발견하고 역으로 함정을 팔 수 있을 정도로요.

1100707869.english: I had no choice but to come forward to avoid further victims.
1100707869.korean: 더 이상의 피해자를 늘리지 않기 위해서 제가 나설 수밖에 없었죠.

1100707872.english: I ate this in one bite!

1100707873.english: Isn't it a relief to be so perfectly shaved?

1100707874.english: Yeah, I think I've been chasing too many easy wins lately.
1100707874.korean: 그래. 최근에 너무 쉬운 승리만 추구했던 거 같아.

1100707875.english: The gambler must pursue excitement, you know.

1100707876.english: Wow. Thanks to you, Duelist, I realized something I had forgotten.
1100707876.korean: 이야. 듀얼리스트 양 덕분에 내가 잊고 있던 것을 깨달았어.

1100707878.english: This time it's my loss. Now, the stakes are all yours.
1100707878.korean: 이번에는 내 패배야. 자, 판돈은 전부 아가씨 거야.

1100707879.english: It was a good match. Let's have another game next time.
1100707879.korean: 좋은 승부였어. 다음에 또 한판 붙어보자고.

1100707880.english: Kyahahahahaha! I definitely won't lose next time.

1100707882.english: The loser should step down quietly.

1100707887.english: have so many things to say to that con artist girl.
1100707887.korean: 사기꾼 아가씨에게 할 말이 무척이나 많은데 말이야.

1100707888.english: I, I don't have much to say?
1100707888.korean: 나, 나는 별로 할 말이 없는데?

1100707891.english: No, I told you those guys don't make sense!
1100707891.korean: 아니, 그 녀석들 말이 안 통한다니까!

1100707892.english: They just say what they want to say and interpret what I say to their own liking!
1100707892.korean: 자기들 할 말만 하고 내 말은 그냥 자기들 편한대로 해석하고 말이야!

1100707893.english: I'd rather talk to a wall!

1100707894.english: Just because you can communicate doesn't mean it's good.

1100707895.english: Do you know how frustrating it is to hear people say things that just scratch my insides even though they know what's wrong?
1100707895.korean: 알면서도 짐의 속을 박박 긁는 말만 하는게 얼마나 분통이 터지는지 아느냐?

1100707896.english: It's even worse because it's so obvious that you're enjoying it!
1100707896.korean: 심지어 그걸 즐기고 있는 게 뻔히 보이니 더 악질이다!

1100707897.english: It's worse to have no ill intentions!
1100707897.korean: 아무런 악의가 없는 게 더 성질이 나빠!

1100707898.english: No, they think it's worse to act with good intentions!
1100707898.korean: 아니, 자기들 딴에는 선의로 행동하는게 더 나빠!

1100707899.english: If I get angry even if the result is bad, I will be the only bad person!
1100707899.korean: 결과가 나빠도 화내면 나만 나쁜 사람이 되니까!

1100707900.english: It's no use getting angry when it's clear that you're just teasing me, so it's no good.
1100707900.korean: 짐을 놀려먹는게 분명해서 화를 내도 소용 없는 것도 좋을 것이 없느니라.

1100707901.english: And how annoying it is that those who usually bicker with each other join forces to make fun of me!
1100707901.korean: 그리고 평소에는 서로 티격태격하는 것들이 나를 놀릴 때는 합심하는 게 얼마나 괘씸한데!

1100707902.english: How frustrating it is to try to impose physical sanctions, but one is too physically strong and the other is just too quick-witted to do anything about it!
1100707902.korean: 물리적인 제재를 가하려고 해도 하나는 신체가 지나치게 강건하고, 또 다른 하나는 눈치만 쓸데없이 빨라서 어떻게 할 도리가 없는 것이 얼마나 답답한지!

1100707905.english: Okay, have a glass of tomato juice.

1100707907.english: I am in so much pain…

1100707914.english: My ears are a little ticklish…

1100707916.english: But I wonder if this is the right place?

1100707918.english: Secret research lab of a famous car maker from the past.
1100707918.korean: 과거의 유명 메이커 자동차 비밀 연구소.

1100707919.english: This is where we research extreme power machines that transcend all regulations.
1100707919.korean: 모든 규제를 초월한 극한의 파워 머신을 연구하던 곳이죠.

1100707920.english: It looks like an ordinary repair shop, but…

1100707921.english: They say there are endless tracks underground.
1100707921.korean: 지하에 끝없는 트랙이 펼쳐져 있다고 해요.

1100707922.english: It is said that they experimented with going beyond zero-hundred and even zero-thousand there.
1100707922.korean: 그곳에서 제로백을 넘어서 제로천도 실험했다고 해요.

1100707923.english: If we had just that research data, we could vastly improve the mobility of the Orca Army.
1100707923.korean: 그 연구자료만 있다면 오르카 육군의 기동성을 월등하게 향상시킬 수 있을 거예요.

1100707927.english: Wait, let me figure out what button this is-

1100707928.english: Should we give it a try?

1100707931.english: It must have been an alarm device.

1100707932.english: Even for you, Mr. Azaz, this is too much! It's really not!
1100707932.korean: 아무리 아자즈 님이라도 이건 아니에요! 정말로 아니에요!

1100707941.english: My subordinates told me that if I looked like this, my senior would like it. Until now, I was half-believing it, but seeing that you confessed, it seems it's true. But if you want me to, I'll show you any side of myself. My love... Oh, for you, brother.
1100707941.korean: 이런 모습이 되면 선배가 좋아할 거라고 부하들이 그러더군. 지금까지 반신반의했지만… 선배가 고백한 것을 보면 사실인가 보군. 하지만 선배가 원한다면 그 어떤 모습이든 보여주겠다. 사랑하는… 오, 오빠를 위해서라면.

1100707942.english: Momo and BaekTo said that magical girls shouldn't belong to anyone... but the Magical Gentleman keeps shaking my heart, and I don't know what to do. ...Since it's come to this, there's nothing we can do. I guess I'll have to give up being a magical girl and just become a magical bride for my beloved Lord.
1100707942.korean: 모모와 백토가 말하기를, 마법소녀는 누구 하나의 것이 되어서는 안 된다고 하였는데… 매지컬 젠틀맨께서는 자꾸 소첩의 마음을 흔들어 놓으시니, 소첩은 어쩔 방법을 모르겠사옵니다. …이리 된 이상 어쩔 수 없군요. 마법소녀는 그만두고… 사랑하는 주공만의 마법새댁이 되는 수 밖에요.

1100707944.english: - Time has passed, and it's already December. It's the month that wraps up the year.
1100707944.korean: - 시간이 흘러 어느덧 12월. 한 해를 마무리하는 달이다.

1100707945.english: - With big events like Christmas and New Year's just around the corner, an excited atmosphere is spreading among the Orca crew...
1100707945.korean: - 크리스마스니, 새해니 하는 빅 이벤트들을 앞두고, 오르카의 대원들 사이에서 들뜬 분위기가 퍼져 나가는 가운데…

1100707946.english: - There was one person who was completely out of sync with that lively atmosphere...
1100707946.korean: - 그런 흥겨운 분위기와는 전혀 상관이 없는 인물이 있었으니…

1100707949.english: Hey, can someone help me, please! The commander has changed!
1100707949.korean: 누, 누가 좀 도와줘! 지휘관이 이상해졌어!

1100707950.english: - What I'm working on is... a Valentine's Day event proposal.
1100707950.korean: - 내가 작업하고 있는 건… 발렌타인 행사 기획서.

1100707951.english: - I heard that Sowan is making a giant chocolate cake for this Valentine's event, aiming to surpass Lilith's colossal chocolate sculpture...
1100707951.korean: - 듣자 하니, 소완이 이번 발렌타인 행사에는 리리스의 초거대 초콜릿 조각상을 뛰어넘기 위해 거대한 초콜릿 케이크를 만든다고 하던데…

1100707952.english: - Since I'm the one who has to plan that terrible situation myself, how can I possibly focus on work...?
1100707952.korean: - 그 끔찍한 상황을 내 손으로 기획해야 하는 셈이니, 일이 손에 잡힐 리가 있나…

1100707953.english: You can share it with the crew.

1100707954.english: ...the commander is quite rigid in some peculiar ways.
1100707954.korean: …지휘관은 묘한 부분에서 고지식한 부분이 있단 말이지.

1100707955.english: Well, since you can't focus on work anyway... how about going to a party to clear your head?
1100707955.korean: 그럼, 어차피 일도 손에 안 잡히는 거… 파티나 가서 환기라도 하고 오는 게 어때?

1100707956.english: Yeah, the Densetsu members are renting out the Cafe Horizon building tonight to have their year-end party.
1100707956.korean: 응, 덴세츠 대원들이 오늘 밤에 카페 호라이즌 건물을 빌려서 연말 파티를 열거든.

1100707957.english: Haha, maybe, but... if the commander goes with us, everyone will definitely be happy.
1100707957.korean: 하핫, 그럴 지도 모르지만… 지휘관이 같이 가 주면 분명 다들 좋아할 거야.

1100707958.english: Anyway, since it's a Valentine's event, there's still plenty of time, and it's not that busy, is it?
1100707958.korean: 어차피 발렌타인 이벤트면 시간도 많이 남았고… 그렇게 바쁜 일도 아니잖아?

1100707959.english: - Well, should I clear my afternoon schedule then?
1100707959.korean: - 뭐, 그럼 오후 스케줄을 좀 비워두도록 할까?

1100707960.english: - I was also curious about what kind of party the Densetsu members would have...
1100707960.korean: - 덴세츠 대원들은 대체 무슨 파티를 할지 궁금하기도 했으니…

1100707961.english: - I've decided to accept Clover's offer.

1100707962.english: - However, I shouldn't have accepted that offer.
1100707962.korean: - 그러나, 나는 그 제안을 받아들이지 말았어야 했다.

1100707963.english: - Because the party I encountered... was beyond my imagination.
1100707963.korean: - 왜냐하면, 내가 마주하게 된 파티는… 내 상상을 초월한 것이었으니까.

1100707964.english: Music is essential to create a party atmosphere.
1100707964.korean: 파티 분위기를 내기 위해선 음악이 필수.

1100707965.english: It's time for me to show off the DJing skills I've been diligently honing.
1100707965.korean: 제가 평소 열심히 갈고 닦아 온 디제잉 실력을 뽐낼 시간이군요.

1100707966.english: ...DJing? That's a hobby I really didn't expect.

1100707967.english: It was already a shock that you were playing rock music on an electric violin, but I had no idea you were also DJing.
1100707967.korean: 당신이 전자 바이올린으로 록 음악을 연주하는 것만 해도 큰 충격이었는데, 디제잉까지 하고 있었을 줄이야.

1100707968.english: Haha, I never thought I'd develop a hobby like this.
1100707968.korean: 후후, 저도 이런 취미가 생길 줄은 몰랐답니다.

1100707969.english: Anyway... should I set up the turntable here?

1100707971.english: Shall we try to liven things up a bit?

1100707972.english: - Armand and Charlotte set up a turntable they've brought from somewhere and play some lively music.
1100707972.korean: - 어디선가 가져온 턴테이블을 설치하고 흥겨운 음악을 트는 아르망과 샬럿.

1100707973.english: The most important thing at a party is a lively atmosphere.
1100707973.korean: 파티에서 가장 중요한 것은 후끈 달아오른 분위기.

1100707977.english: Don't worry about fire, so feel free to go all out!
1100707977.korean: 화재 걱정은 없으니, 마음껏 해버려도 좋아!

1100707981.english: - Zero and Kaen building a huge campfire. Serpent... wasn't a member of the Densetsu team, but seemed to be present as a security guard.
1100707981.korean: - 거대한 캠프파이어를 만드는 제로와 카엔. 서펀트는… 덴세츠 대원은 아니지만 안전 요원 역할로 동석한 것 같았다.

1100707982.english: Alright, everyone... please do the Magical Ready~!

1100707987.english: - Momo, who launches an RPG into the night sky and sets off spectacular fireworks, and Hraesvelgr, who is ecstatic watching the display.
1100707987.korean: - 밤 하늘에 RPG를 날려 화려한 폭죽을 터뜨리는 모모와, 그 모습을 보고 열광하는 흐레스벨그.

1100707990.english: The reason I'm here is very simple. That's because I was awarded the Honorary Densetsu Member Medal in recognition of my dedication and effort devoted to the Magical Girl Momo series over the years.
1100707990.korean: 제가 여기 있는 이유는 굉장히 간단합니다. 그 동안 마법소녀 모모 시리즈에 바친 제 헌신과 노력을 인정받아, 명예 덴세츠 대원 훈장을 받았기 때문이죠.

1100707991.english: If it weren't for Hraesvelgr, the Magical Girl Momo series would have been lost a long time ago.
1100707991.korean: 확실히 흐레스벨그가 아니었으면 마법소녀 모모 시리즈가 많이 소실되었을 거야.

1100707992.english: Thanks to you having even rare footage, it was a great help.
1100707992.korean: 희귀한 영상까지 가지고 있던 덕분에 많은 도움이 되었어.

1100707993.english: That's all thanks to the commander allowing us to pursue our hobbies freely.
1100707993.korean: 그게 다 사령관님께서 저희의 자유로운 취미 생활을 허가해주신 덕분이죠.

1100707994.english: Haha, the commander gets shy too, huh?

1100707995.english: When you think about it, this party is happening thanks to the commander, so don't be shy and just enjoy it.
1100707995.korean: 따져보면 이 파티가 열리게 된 것도 지휘관 덕분이니까, 부끄러워 하지 말고 그냥 파티를 즐기라고.

1100707996.english: That's right. It's practically the same as a party hosted by the commander...
1100707996.korean: 그렇죠. 사실상 사령관님께서 개최하신 파티나 다름없는 셈이니…

1100707997.english: Please enjoy the party as well, Commander.

1100707998.english: - ...I felt like I'd get trapped in an endless cycle of praise if I stayed any longer, so I promised the two of them that I'd enjoy the party to the fullest and quickly decided to leave.
1100707998.korean: - …아무래도 이대로 가다간 끝없는 칭찬의 순환에 갇혀버릴 것 같아, 나는 두 사람에게 파티를 한껏 만끽하겠다고 약속하고는 재빨리 자리를 떠나기로 했다.

1100707999.english: - While I was walking around the party venue like that...

1100708000.english: - I encountered Enrai, who was sitting alone in the corner with a gloomy expression, drinking her glass.
1100708000.korean: - 나는 구석에서 침울한 표정으로 혼자 술잔을 기울이고 있는 엔라이와 마주치게 되었다.

1100708001.english: - Come to think of it, I haven't spent much time with Enrai lately...
1100708001.korean: - 그러고 보니, 최근 엔라이와 함께 시간을 보낸 적이 그리 많지 않았었지…

1100708002.english: - Shall I chat with Enrai for a bit after all this time?
1100708002.korean: - 간만에 엔라이와 이야기나 조금 해보도록 할까.

1100708004.english: - Enrai, whose face was flushed as if drunk, looked at me and gave a bitter smile.
1100708004.korean: - 술에 취한 듯 얼굴이 붉어진 엔라이는 나를 보고 씁쓸한 미소를 지었다.

1100708006.english: I was regretting my weak heart and trying to soothe myself with alcohol.
1100708006.korean: 소첩의 나약한 마음이 원망스러워 홀로 술로 마음을 달래고 있었사옵니다.

1100708008.english: - "That's what Enrai said, pointing at the magical girls.

1100708010.english: Actually, I... recently had a serious argument with Sumire and Hatsuna.
1100708010.korean: 사실, 소첩… 최근 스미레, 하츠나와 심하게 말다툼을 했사옵니다.

1100708011.english: ...that's why... Sumire and Hatsu-naga were awake in the middle of the night...
1100708011.korean: …그것이… 스미레와 하츠나가 한 밤중에 잠도 안 자고…

1100708012.english: What are you watching, a magical girl series?!

1100708013.english: The kunoichi is the master's sword. It's important to get enough sleep to conserve your fighting strength...
1100708013.korean: 쿠노이치는 주공의 검. 충분한 수면을 취해 전투력을 보존하는 것이 중요한 법인데…

1100708014.english: Staying up all night and doing something that would hinder your performance on the next day's mission is grounds for disqualification as a kunoichi.
1100708014.korean: 밤을 새서 다음 날의 임무 수행에 지장을 줄 짓을 하다니, 쿠노이치 실격인 법이옵니다.

1100708015.english: Furthermore... even tho I gave her a video recording of my kunoichi secret techniques, thinking she should just train instead, she's still watching magical girl anime.
1100708015.korean: 게다가… 차라리 그럴 거면 수련이나 하라는 뜻에서, 소첩의 쿠노이치 비전 기술을 녹화한 영상을 주었음에도 불구하고 마법소녀 만화를 보고 있다니.

1100708016.english: It made me so angry that I scolded the two children...
1100708016.korean: 그것이 너무 화가 나서 두 아이를 나무랐더니…

1100708017.english: ...Are you saying my secret technique video isn't interesting?!
1100708017.korean: …소첩의 비전 기술 영상은 재미가 없다고 하는 것 아니옵니까!!

1100708018.english: So... at the time, I severely scolded the two children, but...
1100708018.korean: 그래서… 그 당시에는 두 아이를 엄중히 나무랐습니다만…

1100708019.english: Actually, I also felt that the video lecture on the Kunoichi Secret Technique was not very interesting.
1100708019.korean: 사실, 쿠노이치 비전 기술 강의 영상이 재미가 없다는 것은 소첩도 느끼고 있었던 점이옵니다.

1100708020.english: So... I tried my best to find a way to fix that, but...
1100708020.korean: 그래서… 어떻게든 그 점을 고칠 방법을 찾고자 노력을 해 보았으나...

1100708021.english: I simply couldn't think of a solution.

1100708022.english: So, I wanted to consult with the magical girls to make a fun video, but...
1100708022.korean: 그래서, 재밌는 영상을 만들기 위해 마법소녀 분들께 상담을 하고자 하였으나…

1100708023.english: ...I've been held back because of that old video.
1100708023.korean: …과거의 그 영상 때문에 발목이 잡혀 버렸사옵니다.

1100708024.english: - The video Enrai is talking about is the movie "Magical Girl Magical Momo: The Mine of Enrai's Attack," which was once Enrai's trauma.
1100708024.korean: - 엔라이가 말하는 영상은, 한때 엔라이의 트라우마였던 <마법소녀 매지컬 모모 극장판 마인 엔라이의 습격>을 말하는 것.

1100708025.english: - There, Enrai was supposed to appear as a powerful villain who could not be overcome by the combined strength of Moonbit and Momo alone, but...
1100708025.korean: - 거기에서 엔라이는 백토와 모모의 힘만으로는 극복할 수 없는 강력한 악당으로 나올 예정이었으나…

1100708026.english: - Due to an unexpected accident during filming, her memory became confused, leading to the incident where she believed Moonbit and Momo were her daughters.
1100708026.korean: - 촬영 도중 발생한 불의의 사고로 인해 기억에 혼선이 일어났고, 그 때문에 백토와 모모를 자신의 딸들이라고 믿는 해프닝이 발생했다.

1100708027.english: - The two magical girls, who had never experienced affection before, were completely swayed by Enrai's relentless displays of affection and ended up pretending to be Enrai's daughters until her memory returned...
1100708027.korean: - 평소 애정을 받아본 적 없던 두 마법소녀들은 엔라이가 마구 퍼붓는 애정공세에 그대로 휘둘려, 엔라이의 기억이 돌아올 때까지 엔라이의 딸을 연기하게 되었고…

1100708028.english: - Of course, the movie turned out terrible.

1100708029.english: - And that left a deep wound on Enrai, who had strong pride in herself as an actor.
1100708029.korean: - 그리고 그건 배우로서의 자신에 강한 프라이드를 가지고 있는 엔라이에게 큰 상처로 남게 되었던 것이다.

1100708030.english: Of course, I understand that those children are different people from Momo and BaekTo back then... I naturally know that much.
1100708030.korean: 물론, 저 아이들이 그때의 모모와 백토와는 다른 사람이라는 것 정도는… 소첩도 당연히 알고 있습니다.

1100708031.english: I, too, am not the Enrai of that time, but a restored being. But, still...
1100708031.korean: 소첩 또한 그때의 엔라이가 아닌, 복원된 존재니까요. 하지만, 그래도…

1100708032.english: ...It's just inevitable that I feel ashamed or embarrassed every time I see those children...
1100708032.korean: …역시 저 아이들을 볼 때마다 수치스러운 감정이 들거나, 부끄러움이 느껴지는 건 어쩔 수가 없는 노릇 아니겠사옵니까…

1100708033.english: ...but the Lord's words are truly correct...

1100708034.english: I am only afraid that I might express negative emotions in my actions and hurt the two children who have done nothing wrong...
1100708034.korean: 혹여나 소첩이 부정적인 감정을 행동에 내비쳐, 아무런 잘못도 하지 않은 두 아이들에게 상처를 줄까 두려울 따름이기에…

1100708035.english: Instead of enjoying the party, I have decided to drink alone in this corner.
1100708035.korean: 파아 - 티를 즐기는 대신, 이 구석에서 혼자 술잔을 기울이기로 결정한 것이옵니다.

1100708036.english: Hmph, as always, you're very kind, my lord...
1100708036.korean: 후후, 주공께서는 언제나 그렇듯 참으로 상냥하시지만…

1100708037.english: Loneliness is like the wind, always by the kunoichi's side. So, you don't need to worry too much.
1100708037.korean: 고독이란 바람과 같아, 언제나 쿠노이치들의 곁에 있는 것. 그러니 너무 걱정하지 않으셔도 괜찮사옵니다.

1100708038.english: Because I'm used to being alone.

1100708039.english: - I sighed deeply, then picked up my glass and sat down next to Enrai.
1100708039.korean: - 나는 한숨을 푹 쉬고는, 술잔을 들고 엔라이의 옆자리에 앉았다.

1100708040.english: ...L-Lord...? You don't have to be so considerate of me...
1100708040.korean: …주, 주공? 소첩을 그리 배려해 주지 않으셔도…

1100708043.english: Instead of becoming a kunoichi and easing my lord's worries, I'm just getting in the way of him enjoying his party...
1100708043.korean: 쿠노이치가 되어 주공의 근심을 덜어드리기는커녕, 주공이 파아 - 티를 즐기는 것을 방해나 하는 꼴이라니…

1100708044.english: What do you mean by that?

1100708046.english: That, that kind of talk... is cheating.

1100708047.english: ...Actually, I was already planning to consult with the Lord about this issue, but...
1100708047.korean: …사실, 안 그래도 주공께 이 문제를 상담하려 했으나…

1100708048.english: The moment I stood before the Lord's door, my heart was pounding and fluttering so much, like a girl in her first love... I couldn't bring myself to go see the Lord.
1100708048.korean: 주공의 방문 앞에 서는 순간, 첫사랑에 빠진 소녀처럼 너무 두근대고 설레는 마음에… 차마 주공을 뵈러 갈 수가 없었사옵니다.

1100708049.english: Her body is no longer that of a girl, and yet, how foolish this is...
1100708049.korean: 소녀라고 할 수 없는 몸인데, 이 얼마나 주책 맞은 짓인지…

1100708050.english: It's embarrassing just to think about it.

1100708053.english: - Enrai's expression suddenly cleared as if the alcohol had completely worn off, and she stood up from her seat with a face flushed red.
1100708053.korean: - 엔라이는 술이 확 깨기라도 한 듯한 표정을 짓고는, 새빨갛게 물든 얼굴로 자리에서 일어났다.

1100708055.english: - And then, Enrai vanished in an instant, disappearing from the party...
1100708055.korean: - 그리고, 엔라이는 순식간에 모습을 감추고 파티장에서 사라져 버렸다…

1100708056.english: - Is there a good way to resolve the awkward tension lingering between Enrai and the magical girls...?
1100708056.korean: - 엔라이와 마법소녀들 사이에 맴도는 어색한 기류를 해결해 줄 좋은 방법이 없을까…

1100708057.english: - While I was having those worries...

1100708058.english: ...I seem to have heard the term "magical girl" from somewhere.

1100708059.english: I think I heard the word "friendship" too.
1100708059.korean: 우정이라는 말도 들려온 것 같고 말이야.

1100708061.english: And the hero of friendship, Clover Ace!

1100708063.english: - And I don't think I ever said the word "friendship," did I...?
1100708063.korean: - 그리고 우정이라는 말은 한 적 없을 텐데…?

1100708064.english: Damn it! Commander! That's not what's important right now!
1100708064.korean: 에잇! 지휘관! 지금 그런 게 중요한 게 아니야!

1100708065.english: What's important right now is that Mr. Enrai and the magical girls need to get along!
1100708065.korean: 지금 중요한 건, 엔라이 씨와 마법소녀들의 사이가 좋아져야 한다는 사실!

1100708067.english: That's definitely a difficult task. There are many obstacles in the way.
1100708067.korean: 그건 확실히 어려운 일이야. 앞을 가로막는 장애물이 많지.

1100708069.english: Tonight, it's the Commander and me... we're a double hero team.
1100708069.korean: 오늘 밤은 지휘관과 나… 더블 히어로니까.

1100708071.english: Okay, okay. Then let's go with Triple... no, let's go with OOO Hero.
1100708071.korean: …알겠어, 알겠어. 그럼 트리플… 아니, OOO 히어로로 하자고.

1100708072.english: By the way, this is read as "Oz," not "Ooo."
1100708072.korean: 참고로 이건 오오오가 아니라 오즈라고 읽는 거야.

1100708074.english: It's named after one of the legends of the hero industry.
1100708074.korean: 히어로 업계의 전설 중 하나의 이름에서 따 왔지.

1100708075.english: Okay, now that we've decided on a name, shall we get started?

1100708076.english: Mr. Enrai and the Magical Girls' Friendship Restoration Project... also known as 'Let's Be Friends'!
1100708076.korean: 엔라이 씨와 마법소녀들의 우정 회복 프로젝트… 일명 ‘친해지길 바랍니다’를!

1100708077.english: - A week has passed since the 'Let's Get Closer' project began.

1100708079.english: - Surprisingly, there was no progress at all.

1100708081.english: I never knew Mr. Enrai was so shy.
1100708081.korean: 엔라이 씨가 그렇게 수줍음이 많을 줄이야.

1100708082.english: Perhaps I underestimated Mr. Enrai's inner child...
1100708082.korean: 엔라이 씨의 소녀심을 너무 얕본 건가…

1100708083.english: Huh? What does that mean, Commander? You're saying the method is the problem?
1100708083.korean: 응? 그게 무슨 소리야 지휘관? 방법이 문제라니?

1100708084.english: Hmm, the things I've done so far...

1100708085.english: It doesn't seem like there was a big problem, did there?

1100708086.english: Like, watching the Magical Girl Momo series together and getting used to Momo...
1100708086.korean: 같이 마법소녀 모모 시리즈를 보며 모모에게 익숙해진다거나…

1100708087.english: Or, while playing the Densetsu fighting game, it encourages you to become interested in magical girls.
1100708087.korean: 덴세츠 대전격투 게임을 하면서 마법소녀들에게 관심을 가지게 유도한다거나.

1100708089.english: - Since Enrai is the type of person who can't refuse when someone pushes something on them, they might have watched manga or played games together, but...
1100708089.korean: - 남이 뭔가를 밀어붙이면 거절을 못하는 성격의 엔라이인 만큼, 같이 만화를 보거나 게임을 하기는 했겠지만…

1100708090.english: - Since it wasn't an area of interest, what those two people were saying likely didn't resonate much.
1100708090.korean: - 관심 있는 분야가 아닌 만큼, 이 두 사람이 말하려는 것들이 크게 와닿지는 않았을 터.

1100708091.english: - So, it's no wonder there's no progress.

1100708092.english: Definitely... that's something I hadn't considered.

1100708093.english: - I guess I'll have to drive.

1100708094.english: ...What method are you planning to use?

1100708095.english: - If there are any crew members who have had similar experiences to Enrai...

1100708096.english: - I'm sure we'll be able to achieve good results.
1100708096.korean: - 분명 좋은 결과를 만들어낼 수 있겠지.

1100708097.english: Please wait a moment, Commander. I will check the location immediately.
1100708097.korean: 잠시만 기다려주십시오, 사령관님. 즉시 위치 확인하겠습니다.

1100708099.english: Hello, Mr. Enrai! I have a question about the cooking you told me about last time...
1100708099.korean: 안녕하세요, 엔라이 씨! 저번에 알려주신 요리 관련으로 여쭤볼 게 있는데요…

1100708100.english: Hmm, of course, I think the commander's plan will be more effective than the method we used, but...
1100708100.korean: 으음, 물론 지휘관의 계책이 우리가 쓴 방법보다는 효과가 좋을 거라고 생각하지만…

1100708101.english: Why do I feel like things are going to go wrong?
1100708101.korean: 왜 일이 이상하게 꼬일 것 같다는 느낌이 드는 걸까?

1100708102.english: Yes, you're in the hangar right now? Okay, I understand. No! You don't need to come all the way to our accommodation; I'll come and see you right away. Yes, thank you.
1100708102.korean: 네, 지금 격납고에 계시다고요? 알겠습니다. 아니에요! 굳이 저희 숙소까지 오실 필요 없이, 제가 금방 찾아뵐게요. 네, 감사합니다.

1100708103.english: ...Target location tracking successful. The target's current location is estimated to be the hangar.
1100708103.korean: …타겟 위치 추적 성공했습니다. 타겟 현재 위치는 격납고로 추정됩니다.

1100708104.english: - Luckily, the members I need to call are also nearby.
1100708104.korean: - 때마침 내가 부를 대원도 그 근처에 있는 상황.

1100708105.english: - It seemed like the 'Let's Get Closer' project was finally about to bear fruit.
1100708105.korean: - 아무래도 ‘친해지길 바랍니다’ 프로젝트가 드디어 결실을 맺을 때인 것 같았다.

1100708108.english: (Recently, Mr. Hraesvelgr and Mr. Clover Ace have been recommending magical girl-related creative works quite a bit...)
1100708108.korean: (최근, 흐레스벨그 씨와 클로버 에이스 씨가 유독 마법소녀 관련 창작물들을 권하는 건…)

1100708109.english: (It must be the Lord Duke showing consideration for this humble servant, as expected.)

1100708110.english: (I couldn't control a single emotion and worried the Lord... I am disqualified as a kunoichi.)
1100708110.korean: (감정 하나 통제하지 못해, 주공을 걱정시키다니… 소첩, 쿠노이치 실격이옵니다.)

1100708111.english: (I need to find a way to manage these feelings somehow, but I can't think of any way at all. What should I do about this...?
1100708111.korean: (어떻게든 이 감정을 추스릴 방법을 찾아야 하는데, 도무지 방법이 떠오르지 않사옵니다.이를 어쩌면 좋을런지…)

1100708114.english: What's the matter that you're sighing so heavily?
1100708114.korean: 무슨 일이길래 그렇게 한숨을 쉬고 계십니까?

1100708115.english: Ah... aren't you the Line Litter Gong?

1100708116.english: I'm sorry. I am incompetent and have caused you worry.

1100708117.english: Haha, you're worried? Not at all.

1100708118.english: It is a knight's natural duty to solve a lady's worries. Please don't feel it's rude or a burden, and feel free to talk comfortably.
1100708118.korean: 레이디의 고민을 해결하는 건 기사 된 자로써 당연한 의무. 실례나 폐라고 생각하지 마시고 편히 얘기해 보시죠.

1100708119.english: As the saying goes, a problem shared is a problem halved, isn't it?
1100708119.korean: 고민은 나누면 반이 된다는 말도 있지 않습니까?

1100708121.english: ...Sigh, as you said... perhaps confiding this frustration in someone is a good way to manage my emotions.
1100708121.korean: …하아, 그 말씀대로… 누군가에게 이 답답함을 털어놓는 것도 감정을 다스리는 데에 좋은 방법일지도 모르겠군요.

1100708124.english: So, to summarize, you want to resolve the awkwardness with the magical girls, but it's not as easy as you'd hoped.
1100708124.korean: 그러니까, 요약하자면 마법소녀 분들과의 어색함을 해결하고 싶은데, 마음처럼 쉽지 않다는 것이군요.

1100708126.english: But... according to Lady Enrai, haven't you already overcome the trauma from that movie?
1100708126.korean: 하지만… 레이디 엔라이의 말씀대로라면, 그 영화에 대한 트라우마는… 이미 극복하신 것 아니었습니까?

1100708127.english: ...Of course, after meeting with the Lord, my thoughts on that movie have changed quite a bit.
1100708127.korean: …물론, 주공과의 면담 후… 그 영화에 대한 생각이 많이 바뀌기는 했사옵니다.

1100708128.english: That movie is no longer a source of shame for me... it's proof of my love for my two daughters.
1100708128.korean: 그 영화는 더 이상 소첩의 치부가 아닌… 두 딸들에 대한 사랑을 보여주는 증거라고요.

1100708131.english: The foolishness I displayed back then cannot be undone, can it?!
1100708131.korean: 그때 부린 주책은 주워담을 수 없지 않사옵니까!!

1100708132.english: This is the academy where my two children go...

1100708133.english: If it's this time, they're probably spending time at the pool.
1100708133.korean: 지금 시간이라면 분명 수영장에서 시간을 보내고 있겠군요.

1100708134.english: Sumire and Hatsuna... leaving their lunches behind...

1100708135.english: They must be starving because they didn't have lunch...
1100708135.korean: 분명 점심을 먹지 못해 굶주리고 있겠지요…

1100708136.english: Thinking of the children shivering with hunger and cold, and crying...
1100708136.korean: 굶주림과 추위에 벌벌 떨며, 눈물을 흘리고 있을 아이들을 생각하니…

1100708137.english: It's as painful as if my internal organs are twisting.

1100708138.english: Wait, Sumire, Hatsuna! This mother is bringing a 12-layer lunchbox for the two of you!
1100708138.korean: 기다리세요, 스미레, 하츠나! 이 어미가 두 사람을 위해 12층짜리 도시락을 가져갑니다!

1100708139.english: However, it wouldn't be polite to go to the pool looking like this...
1100708139.korean: 하지만 수영장에 이 모습으로 가는 것은 예의가 아닐 터…

1100708140.english: ...I suppose I should change into the appropriate attire, shouldn't I?

1100708142.english: PD-nim, that... is that okay to be in the drama?
1100708142.korean: PD님, 저거… 저거 드라마에 나와도 괜찮은 거예요?

1100708144.english: Will that be okay? Quick, get your camera out! We're rated 12 and up!
1100708144.korean: 괜찮겠냐? 빠, 빨리 카메라 꺼! 우리 12세 이용가야!

1100708145.english: If that comes out exactly as it is, we're all going to be fired!
1100708145.korean: 저거 그대로 나오면 우리 싹 다 모가지야!

1100708150.english: Oh, you mean this? I thought it would be rude to come to the pool without wearing a swimsuit, so...
1100708150.korean: 아, 이거 말인가요? 수영장에 오는 데 수영복을 입지 않는 건 예의가 아닌 것 같아서…

1100708151.english: I tried on my school swimsuit. School mizugi... is that what you call it?
1100708151.korean: 학교 수영복을 입어봤답니다. 스쿨미즈… 라고 하죠?

1100708153.english: You really should dress appropriately for the occasion, shouldn't you?
1100708153.korean: 역시 장소에 맞는 복장을 입어야 하는 것 아니겠어요?

1100708154.english: Mr. Enrai? What on earth are you doing here...?
1100708154.korean: 엔라이 씨? 여기는 대체 무슨 일로…?

1100708155.english: They left their lunchbox behind. So, this mother brought lunch for the two of you.
1100708155.korean: 점심 도시락을 놓고 갔더군요. 그래서 이 어미가 두 사람을 위해 도시락을 가져왔습니다.

1100708157.english: This should last me at least three days, if not more...
1100708157.korean: 이 정도면 못해도 사흘은 먹을 수 있을 것 같은데요…

1100708158.english: Children in their growth phase should eat this much at every meal.
1100708158.korean: 성장기의 아이들이라면 매 끼 이 정도씩은 먹어줘야 하는 법이옵니다.

1100708160.english: Thank you. Thank you for the meal.

1100708165.english: Haha, I wonder who my daughters take after to be so kind.
1100708165.korean: 후후, 우리 딸들은 대체 누굴 닮아서 이렇게 착한 건지.

1100708166.english: Since it's come to this, I, your mother, will feed you myself.
1100708166.korean: 이리 된 거, 이 어미가 직접 먹여주도록 하겠사옵니다.

1100708170.english: Moonbit ya! Snap out of it!

1100708174.english: ...I know it wasn't me, but... still...
1100708174.korean: …소, 소첩이 저지른 일이 아닌 것은 알지만… 그래도…

1100708175.english: Just thinking about it makes me want to die of embarrassment...
1100708175.korean: 떠올리는 것만으로도 부끄러워 죽을 것 같사옵니다…

1100708178.english: The magical girls surely don't know the inside story.
1100708178.korean: 이 내막을 마법소녀 분들이 알고 있지는 않을 터.

1100708179.english: So, seeing me feel this embarrassment and awkwardness, I'm most worried that you might misunderstand and think I dislike the magical girls... that's my biggest concern.
1100708179.korean: 그러니, 소첩이 이렇게 부끄러움과 어색함을 느끼는 걸 보고, 혹여나 소첩이 마법소녀 분들을 싫어한다고 오해하진 않을지… 그것이 가장 큰 걱정이옵니다.

1100708180.english: If you're afraid of misunderstandings, there's a good way to avoid them.
1100708180.korean: 오해가 두려운 것이라면 좋은 방법이 있습니다.

1100708182.english: ...Actually, I've had a similar experience to Lady Enrai. However, this was a misunderstanding on my part.
1100708182.korean: …사실, 저도 레이디 엔라이와 비슷한 경험을 한 적이 있었습니다. 이건 제 쪽에서 일방적으로 오해를 하고 있던 쪽이지만요.

1100708183.english: Oh dear, what kind of misunderstanding was it?

1100708184.english: In the distant past... I didn't have a very good impression of the Magical Girl Momo series. I used to think it was a childish drama that only kids watched. But...
1100708184.korean: 먼 과거에… 저는 마법소녀 모모 시리즈에 대해 그렇게 좋은 인상을 가지고 있지 않았습니다. 어린애들이나 보는 유치한 드라마라고 생각했던 적이 있지요. 하지만…

1100708185.english: Becoming the guardian of the magical girls, filming and talking with them changed my perspective, and furthermore, we came to understand each other better.
1100708185.korean: 마법소녀 분들의 수호수가 되어, 함께 촬영하고 대화를 나누며 생각을 달리하게 되었고, 더 나아가 서로를 더욱 잘 이해할 수 있게 되었습니다.

1100708188.english: So you're saying that if I become a magical girl, my problems will be solved?

1100708190.english: I think the conclusion is wrong.

1100708191.english: What I mean is, if we just talk...
1100708191.korean: 제 말은, 일단 대화를 해 본다면…

1100708192.english: Thank you, Mr. Rhein Ritter. Thanks to you, the problem has been completely resolved.
1100708192.korean: 감사합니다, 라인리터 공. 덕분에 문제가 전부 해결되었사옵니다.

1100708193.english: How to become a magical girl... There's one thing that comes to mind, so I'll use that method.
1100708193.korean: 마법소녀가 되는 법… 떠오르는 물건이 하나 있으니, 그 방법을 쓰면 되겠군요.

1100708194.english: Then, I shall take my leave now. Now that a good idea has come to me, I can't waste a single second sitting in the hangar... it's too precious!
1100708194.korean: 그럼, 소첩은 이만 가 보도록 하겠사옵니다. 좋은 방법이 떠오른 이 순간, 격납고에 앉아 있는 일분 일초조차 아까우니 말입니다…!

1100708195.english: Um, Lady Enrai? What I mean is not that...
1100708195.korean: 그, 레이디 엔라이? 제 말은 그런 게 아니라…

1100708196.english: ...They left before I could even correct it.

1100708197.english: Well, in the end, it seems my worries have disappeared, so...
1100708197.korean: 뭐, 그래도 결과적으로 고민은 사라진 것 같으니…

1100708198.english: It seems I've taken care of what the commander asked of me.
1100708198.korean: 사령관님께서 부탁하신 건 해결한 것 같군요.

1100708199.english: ...but it doesn't seem to be the case at all.

1100708200.english: I've been running so hard, and I never thought we'd end up missing each other like this again.
1100708200.korean: 열심히 달려왔는데, 이렇게 또 엇갈리게 될 줄이야.

1100708201.english: Anyway, a magical girl transformation item... did those even exist?
1100708201.korean: 그나저나, 마법소녀가 되는 물건이라니… 그런 게 있었나요?

1100708202.english: Yeah, you're right. Is there such a thing that can do that?
1100708202.korean: 그러게. 그런 게 가능한 물건이 있나?

1100708203.english: - If the item Enrai mentioned is the one I'm thinking of...
1100708203.korean: - 만약 엔라이가 말한 물건이, 내가 알고 있는 그것이라면…

1100708204.english: - It's possible that something truly unimaginable could happen.
1100708204.korean: - 정말 상상을 초월하는 사건이 터질지도 모르는 일이다.

1100708205.english: ...Surely, Mr. Enrai isn't planning to use that...?

1100708207.english: ...that object is too dangerous. That falling into Mr. Enrai's hands...
1100708207.korean: …그 물건은 너무 위험합니다. 그게 엔라이 씨의 손에 들어가는 건…

1100708208.english: We must stop it no matter what.

1100708209.english: This isn't the time or place for this. We have to stop Mr. Enrai quickly...!
1100708209.korean: 여기서 이럴 때가 아니야. 어서 엔라이 씨를 막아야만 해…!

1100708211.english: ...It will be okay. The door to the technical department's warehouse is reinforced with Mr. Azaz's technology, so...!
1100708211.korean: …괜찮을 겁니다. 기술부 창고의 문은 아자즈 씨의 기술로 강화되어 있으니까…!

1100708212.english: - Clover, Hraesvelgr, and I rushed toward the technology department warehouse, but...
1100708212.korean: - 나와 클로버, 흐레스벨그는 황급히 기술부 창고를 향해 달려갔으나…

1100708213.english: ...I hadn't thought about how to break the wall.

1100708214.english: ...Well, if it's Mr. Enrai, it's certainly possible.
1100708214.korean: …하긴, 엔라이 씨 정도라면 충분히 가능한 일이지.

1100708215.english: Next time, I'll have to reinforce the walls too.

1100708217.english: ...Yes, as the commander suspected. It seems we'll have to declare a state of emergency.
1100708217.korean: …네, 역시 사령관님의 짐작대로입니다. 아무래도 비상 사태를 선포해야겠군요.

1100708219.english: Whew, this viewing party was satisfying too.

1100708220.english: Yeah, this episode is really fun too. Who would have thought that Mr. BaekTo would awaken "Magical Girl's Extreme" there to counter Mr. Faucre's "Faucre Beast Mode"...
1100708220.korean: 그러게… 이번 편도 정말 재밌다. 거기서 백토 씨가 뽀끄루 씨의 『뽀끄루 비스트 모드』에 맞서서 『마법소녀의 극의』를 깨우칠 줄이야…

1100708222.english: I wonder if I could create something like "Barbariana Beast Mode" too?
1100708222.korean: 나도 『바바리아나 비스트 모드』 같은 거 하나 만들 수 없나?

1100708223.english: Aha ha, why don't we talk to the main person?

1100708224.english: But, I suddenly have a question...
1100708224.korean: 그런데, 갑자기 궁금한 게 하나 생겼는데…

1100708225.english: Heh heh, I'm glad Harpyia is taking an interest in the Momo series. What are you curious about?
1100708225.korean: 후후, 하르페이아가 모모 시리즈에 관심을 가져주니 저도 기쁘군요. 궁금한 게 뭔가요?

1100708226.english: Strictly speaking, it's not about the Momo series. What I'm curious about is...
1100708226.korean: 엄밀히 말하면 모모 시리즈 얘기는 아니야. 뭐가 궁금한 거냐면…

1100708227.english: Wasn't there a magical girl series made in Bismark?

1100708229.english: ...I don't know either. I know everything there is to know about Magical Momo, but...
1100708229.korean: …저도 잘 모르겠군요. 제가 매지컬 모모와 관련된 거라면 전부 파악하고 있지만…

1100708230.english: I don't think I've heard of the Bismark Magical Girl.
1100708230.korean: 비스마르크 마법소녀에 대해서 들어보진 못 한 것 같군요.

1100708231.english: That's a shame. If Magical Girl Momo had been this successful, I'm sure Bismark would have created a rival series to Momo... but it seems there wasn't one.
1100708231.korean: 아쉽네. 마법소녀 모모가 이렇게 잘 나갔으면, 분명 비스마르크에서도 모모 시리즈의 대항마를 만들었을 거라고 생각했는데… 그런 건 없던 모양이네.

1100708233.english: There were plans for a magical girl series in Bismark too. It's something that was stopped at the planning stage, so Hraesvelgr probably wouldn't have known about it either.
1100708233.korean: 비스마르크에도 마법소녀 시리즈가 기획되고 있긴 했어. 기획 단계에서 멈춘 물건이라서 흐레스벨그도 몰랐을 거야.

1100708236.english: Magical Girl Prism Erato? So, is it about Ms. Erato becoming a magical girl?
1100708236.korean: <마법소녀 프리즘 에라토>? 그러면, 에라토 씨가 마법소녀가 되는 내용이야?

1100708237.english: That's right. In Bismark, instead of creating new magical girl Bioroids... they chose to turn existing Bioroids into magical girls.
1100708237.korean: 그렇지. 비스마르크에서는 새로운 마법소녀 바이오로이드를 만드는 대신… 기존 바이오로이드들을 마법소녀로 만드는 쪽을 선택했거든.

1100708238.english: Certainly, that would have been a better way to promote our own androids...
1100708238.korean: 확실히, 그 편이 자사 바이오로이드 홍보를 위해서는 더욱 좋은 방법이었겠네…

1100708239.english: It's a shame I didn't get to meet Bismark's magical girl Bioroids, tho.
1100708239.korean: 비스마르크의 마법소녀 바이오로이드 분들을 만나지 못하게 된 건 아쉽지만 말이죠.

1100708240.english: And what was created for that purpose is the one we recently discovered, that...
1100708240.korean: 그리고 그걸 위해서 만들어진 게, 최근 발견한 그…

1100708243.english: Okay. That's... a truly terrifying thing.
1100708243.korean: 그래. 그건… 진짜 엄청나게 무시무시한 물건이야.

1100708244.english: Even before that, Machina was incredibly flustered when she saw BaekTo holding it.
1100708244.korean: 안 그래도 백토가 그걸 들고 있는 모습을 보고, 마키나가 엄청나게 당황하긴 했지.

1100708245.english: But BaekTo didn't fall or get hurt, did she? Why is it considered such a dangerous object?
1100708245.korean: 하지만 백토가 쓰러지거나 다치진 않았잖아. 왜 그렇게 위험한 물건이라는 거야?

1100708247.english: Prisma sticks are a kind of hypnotic device.

1100708248.english: While holding the Prisma Stick, you are hypnotized into believing you are a magical girl. And my personality... it's become quite uninhibited.
1100708248.korean: 프리즈마 스틱을 쥐고 있는 동안, 최면에 의해 자신이 마법소녀라고 믿게 되지. 성격도… 꽤나 리미트가 풀려 버리고.

1100708249.english: Moonbit... as you all know, during the restoration, something went wrong, and she firmly believes she's a real magical girl, right?
1100708249.korean: 백토는… 너희도 잘 알겠지만, 복원 도중 문제가 생겨서 자기 자신이 진짜 마법소녀라고 굳게 믿고 있잖아?

1100708250.english: That's why it wasn't affected at all.
1100708250.korean: 그래서 아무런 영향을 받지 않았던 거야.

1100708251.english: However, if someone else were to hold that staff...
1100708251.korean: 하지만, 만약 다른 사람이 그 지팡이를 잡게 된다면…

1100708255.english: No, should I call you the Magical Gentleman?

1100708256.english: Thanks to my consultation with Lord Rhein Ritter, I have finally opened my eyes.
1100708256.korean: 소첩, 라인리터 공과의 상담 덕택에 드디어 눈을 뜨게 되었사옵니다.

1100708257.english: The fastest way to understand a magical girl is to become one.
1100708257.korean: 마법소녀를 이해하기 위해서는, 마법소녀가 되는 것이 가장 빠른 방법.

1100708258.english: Therefore, I, with the power of the Prisma Stick... have decided to become a magical girl.
1100708258.korean: 그렇기에 소첩, 프리즈마 스틱의 힘을 빌려… 마법소녀가 되기로 하였사옵니다.

1100708259.english: This is my new look. Kunoichi Magical Girl Enrai...
1100708259.korean: 이것이 소첩의 새로운 모습. 쿠노이치 마법소녀 엔라이…

1100708260.english: No, I am the kunoichi magical girl, Prism Sakurai!!

1100708261.english: So, what are you trying to do with that?
1100708261.korean: 그, 그걸로 대체 뭘 하려는 거야?

1100708262.english: Huhu... With this power, this overflowing power... I can do anything.
1100708262.korean: 후후… 이 힘, 이 넘쳐나는 힘이라면… 무엇이든 할 수 있사옵니다.

1100708263.english: However, please do not worry too much. I wouldn't do anything that the Master, or rather... the Magical Gentleman, would dislike.
1100708263.korean: 하지만, 너무 걱정하지 마시옵소서. 주공, 아니… 매지컬 젠틀맨께서 싫어하실 일들은 하지 않을 터이니.

1100708264.english: If I had the power of a magical girl, I could solve all the worries I've had until now.
1100708264.korean: 마법소녀의 힘이 있다면, 그 동안 소첩이 가지고 있던 모든 고민들을 해결할 수 있을 터.

1100708265.english: To solve my own worries, and also to solve the worries of everyone in Orca, I will do both.
1100708265.korean: 소첩의 고민을 해결하는 겸, 겸사겸사 오르카에 있는 모든 분들의 고민을 해결해 드리겠사옵니다.

1100708266.english: What, isn't that a good thing?

1100708267.english: Uh, huh? Isn't it a good thing to solve everyone's problems? Why is that a problem?
1100708267.korean: 으, 응? 모두의 고민을 해결해 준다는 건 좋은 일 아니야? 그게 왜 문제가 된다는 건데?

1100708268.english: - Well, there aren't any bad crew members on the Orca, but...
1100708268.korean: - 그야, 오르카에 있는 대원들 중 나쁜 대원은 없지만…

1100708269.english: - Because there are plenty of eccentric guys among the crew on Orca!
1100708269.korean: - 오르카에 있는 대원들 중에는 엉뚱한 녀석들이 넘쳐나니까!

1100708270.korean: 일단, 모든 분들의 소원을 들어 볼까요.

1100708271.english: Kunoichi Secret Technique, Heavenly Earth Communication!

1100708273.english: Oh, I see... so those were the kinds of worries you had.

1100708274.english: Mr. Brownie, I'm worried because I want to eat more of Ms. Aurora's special cake that was served as a side dish, but I can't.
1100708274.korean: 브라우니 씨, 부식으로 나온 아우로라 씨의 특제 케이크를 더 먹고 싶은데 그럴 수 없는 게 고민이라…

1100708276.english: About 40 should be enough, right? Because it's four times the amount of 10.
1100708276.korean: 40개 정도면 충분하겠지요. 10의 네 배나 되는 양이니까요.

1100708277.english: Oh my god, that's such a terrible thing to do... we have to stop it right now!
1100708277.korean: 세상에, 저렇게 끔찍한 짓이라니… 당장 막아야만 해!

1100708282.english: I... I can't fight against magical girls...!
1100708282.korean: 저는… 마법소녀를 상대로는 싸울 수 없습니다…!

1100708284.english: Heh heh, it seems... one of my companions who could stop me has disappeared.
1100708284.korean: 후후, 보아하니… 저를 막을 동료가 한 명, 사라진 것 같사옵니다.

1100708286.english: But that doesn't mean I'll give up! I won't succumb to a villain who commits evil deeds without batting an eye, just because they claim to solve my problems!
1100708286.korean: 그렇다고 해서 난 포기하지 않아! 고민을 해결해준다는 이유로, 사악한 일을 눈 하나 깜빡하지 않고 저지르는 악당에게 굴복하진 않겠어!

1100708293.english: Hmph, mind-reading is a basic skill for a kunoichi.

1100708294.english: I want to wear a cute dress and go on a date with a magical gentleman, but I'm worried that if I, who am so tomboyish, wear a dress, people will point and laugh at me...
1100708294.korean: 귀여운 드레스를 입고 매지컬 젠틀맨과 데이트를 하고 싶지만, 선머슴 같은 자신이 드레스를 입었다가 남들에게 손가락질을 당하는 것이 아닐까…

1100708295.english: Isn't that the fear Mr. Clover Ace harbors?
1100708295.korean: 그것이 클로버 에이스 씨가 품고 있는 두려움이지 않사옵니까?

1100708297.english: I can help you with that worry.
1100708297.korean: 그 고민, 소첩이 해결해드릴 수 있사옵니다.

1100708298.english: If I could harness the power of this Prisma Stick, I could secretly wear a cute dress and enjoy a date with a Magical Gentleman, hidden from everyone's eyes...
1100708298.korean: 이 프리즈마 스틱의 힘을 이용한다면, 남들의 눈을 피해 귀여운 드레스를 입고 매지컬 젠틀맨과 데이트를 즐길 수 있을 터…

1100708299.english: Are you truly determined to defy me even now?

1100708302.english: I will even add ruffles for you.

1100708305.english: Definitely... that's a really tempting offer. I even considered holding Mr. Enrai's hand, just for a moment.
1100708305.korean: 확실히… 그건 정말 끌리는 제안이야. 잠깐이지만 엔라이 씨와 손을 잡을까 고민했을 정도로.

1100708306.english: ...but I'm going to decline that offer!

1100708307.english: I am Clover Ace, the hero of happiness and friendship!
1100708307.korean: 나는 행복과 우정의 히어로, 클로버 에이스!

1100708308.english: Mr. Enrai's attempt to steal 40 cakes is clearly evil! No matter what happens, I will never compromise with evil!
1100708308.korean: 케이크를 40개나 훔치려는 엔라이 씨의 행동은 명백한 악이야! 나는, 그 어떤 일이 있어도 악과 타협하지 않겠어!

1100708309.english: Because that's the way to protect everyone's happiness!

1100708313.english: - Clover kicked off the ground and leaped powerfully, delivering a kick to Enrai. And then, at that moment...!
1100708313.korean: - 클로버는 땅을 박차고 힘차게 뛰어올라, 엔라이에게 발차기를 날렸다. 그리고, 그 순간…!

1100708314.english: - Clover's kick went right through Enrai's body!
1100708314.korean: - 클로버의 킥은 엔라이의 몸을 그대로 통과해 버렸다!

1100708315.english: What, what is it?! Clone Jutsu...?!

1100708316.english: That is incorrect. This is the power I gained when I became a magical girl...
1100708316.korean: 틀렸사옵니다. 이것이 바로 소첩이 마법소녀가 되면서 얻은 능력…

1100708318.english: Then, please witness the power I have newly gained!
1100708318.korean: 그럼, 소첩이 새롭게 얻은 힘을 똑똑히 보시길!

1100708321.english: Suddenly, the surrounding scenery turned into a hot spring...?! What's this music again?
1100708321.korean: 갑자기 주변 풍경이 온천으로 변했어…?! 이 음악은 또 뭐야?

1100708322.english: And, the person washing over there is...

1100708324.english: Uh... C-Commander... That, that is, I... it seems I took the wrong path...
1100708324.korean: 어어… 지, 지휘관… 그, 그게, 내가… 길을 잘못 들은 모양이야…

1100708325.english: But, um, well, could you put something on...? Um, I can see everything...
1100708325.korean: 그런데, 그, 음, 그러니까… 뭐라도 걸쳐주면 안 될까…? 저기, 다 보이는데…

1100708326.english: Ugh, ugh... Aah... Don't, don't come any closer...!
1100708326.korean: 으, 으아앗… 가, 가까이 오지 마…!

1100708328.english: This, this is... this won't do...

1100708331.english: - Seeing Clover suddenly mumble to herself, blush, and collapse, Hraesvelgr clapped her hands as if she had realized something.
1100708331.korean: - 갑자기 혼잣말을 중얼거리다가 얼굴을 붉히고 쓰러지는 클로버를 보며, 흐레스벨그는 깨달았다는 듯 손뼉을 쳤다.

1100708332.english: ...I see. The identity of the Prisma Stick is...

1100708334.english: The fact that she was instantly in a magical girl outfit, and that Mr. Clover was completely helpless and neutralized... it all makes sense if it was all an effect created using holograms!
1100708334.korean: 순식간에 마법소녀 복장을 입었던 것도, 클로버 씨가 아무것도 하지 못하고 무력화 당한 것도… 전부 홀로그램을 이용해 만들어낸 효과라면 설명이 됩니다!

1100708335.english: The way the Prisma Stick hypnotizes in the first place is probably also through holograms.
1100708335.korean: 애초에 프리즈마 스틱이 최면을 거는 방식도 홀로그램일 겁니다.

1100708336.english: It creates a holographic image in front of the person holding the Prisma Stick, inducing a trance-like state and planting the suggestion that they are a magical girl!
1100708336.korean: 프리즈마 스틱을 잡은 이의 눈 앞에 홀로그램 이미지를 만들어내, 트랜스 상태로 유도한 뒤 본인이 마법소녀라는 암시를 심는 겁니다!

1100708337.english: We should be able to wake Mr. Enrai from her hypnosis.
1100708337.korean: 엔라이 씨를 최면에서 깨울 수 있겠죠.

1100708338.english: But... now that Mr. Clover is also incapacitated... there's no way to stop Mr. Enrai...!
1100708338.korean: 하지만… 클로버 씨까지 무력화 된 지금… 엔라이 씨를 막을 방법이 없습니다…!

1100708341.english: I'm a magical girl just passing by.

1100708342.english: Stealing 40 cakes... that's an undeniable 'evil' that cannot be tolerated.
1100708342.korean: 케이크 40개를 훔친다… 그건 용납할 수 없는 명백한 ‘악’.

1100708343.english: However, Mr. Enrai is a colleague from the company Densetsu, which supports magical girls. She's definitely being controlled by that evil wand.
1100708343.korean: 하지만 엔라이 씨는 마법소녀를 지원하던 기업, 덴세츠 사의 동료. 분명 저 사악한 마법봉에 의해 조종당하는 것이겠죠.

1100708344.english: In the name of Magical BaekTo, I will stop Mr. Enrai right here and now!
1100708344.korean: 마법소녀 매지컬 백토의 이름을 걸고, 이 자리에서 엔라이 씨를 막아내고야 말겠습니다…!

1100708345.english: - The fight between Moonbit and Enrai was evenly matched. No, on the contrary... BaekTo seemed even more dominant than Enrai, who was holding the Prisma Stick.
1100708345.korean: - 백토와 엔라이의 싸움은 막상막하였다. 아니, 오히려… 프리즈마 스틱을 들고 있는 엔라이보다도 백토가 더 우세한 듯이 보였다.

1100708346.english: ...I see. This is a difference in mindset.

1100708347.english: Watch carefully. While Mr. Moonbit is relentlessly attacking Mr. Enrai, not even giving her a chance to use her hologram, Mr. Enrai is unable to actively attack Mr. Moonbit.
1100708347.korean: 잘 보십시오. 백토 씨는 엔라이 씨가 홀로그램을 쓸 틈조차 주지 않고 달려들어 맹공을 퍼붓는 반면, 엔라이 씨는 백토 씨에게 적극적으로 공격을 가하지 못하고 있죠.

1100708348.english: Those who originally seek to subdue others must fight even harder battles. Mr. Enrai's goal isn't to defeat Mr. Moonbit, so she can't use strong techniques recklessly!
1100708348.korean: 본래 남을 제압하려는 자는 더욱 힘든 싸움을 해야 하는 법. 엔라이 씨의 목적은 백토 씨를 쓰러뜨리는 것이 아니기에… 함부로 강한 기술을 쓰지 못하고 있는 겁니다!

1100708349.english: On the other hand, Mr. Moonbit's goal is to defeat Mr. Enrai and eliminate the Prisma Stick! Therefore...
1100708349.korean: 반면, 백토 씨는 엔라이 씨를 쓰러뜨리고 프리즈마 스틱을 없애는 것이 목적! 그렇기에…

1100708350.english: You can use strong techniques as much as you want...!
1100708350.korean: 얼마든지 강한 기술을 쓸 수 있습니다…!

1100708352.english: Friendship and courage! Gather the wishes of the moon people and the power of magic!
1100708352.korean: 우정과 용기! 월인들의 염원과 마법의 힘을 모아!

1100708353.english: Oh, this is a bit dangerous...!

1100708354.english: It's out! Mr. Moonbit's finishing move!

1100708356.english: As expected, that exhilarating chainsaw is Mr. BaekTo's signature move! Mr. BaekTo's finishing move, which splits enemies in half by infusing them with the moon's magic, is the very identity of Magical Girl Magical BaekTo! To witness this firsthand... I am truly so happy, and I will live out this wonderfully excellent life in Hraesvelgr...

1100708358.english: Heh heh, aren't you forgetting something?
1100708358.korean: 후후, 하나 잊고 계신 거 아니옵니까?

1100708359.english: This Enrai is a magical girl and a kunoichi at the same time. In other words... a kunoichi magical girl.
1100708359.korean: 이 엔라이는 마법소녀인 동시에 쿠노이치. 즉… 쿠노이치 마법소녀.

1100708360.english: I am also quite skilled in swordsmanship...!

1100708362.english: After using a big technique, there's inevitably an opening... At this rate...
1100708362.korean: 큰 기술을 쓰고 나면 필연적으로 빈틈이 생기는 법… 이대로라면…

1100708363.english: Mr. Moonbit also falls victim to the hologram attack!

1100708365.english: Could you tell us about Mr. Moonbit's concerns as well?
1100708365.korean: 백토 씨의 고민도 한 번 들려주실까요?

1100708368.english: Heh heh, alright. What is Mr. Moonbit's concern?

1100708369.english: ...Recently, Mr. Enrai has been avoiding Momo and me...!
1100708369.korean: …최근 엔라이 씨가 저와 모모를 피해 다닌다는 거예요…!

1100708372.english: Um, I didn't expect that kind of answer...
1100708372.korean: 그, 그런 대답은 예상 못 했는데…

1100708374.english: It doesn't seem like Momo did anything wrong... I'm just worried that maybe I did something wrong and upset Mr. Enrai...
1100708374.korean: 모모가 잘못을 한 것 같지는 않고… 혹시나 내가 뭔가 잘못해서 엔라이 씨의 기분을 상하게 했을까 걱정이라서…

1100708375.english: I was wandering around again today, looking for Mr. Enrai.
1100708375.korean: 오늘도 엔라이 씨를 찾아서 돌아다니고 있던 거였어요.

1100708376.english: No, that's not it! I, um, the reason I was avoiding the two of you was...
1100708376.korean: 그, 그런 게 아니에요! 소첩은, 그러니까, 소첩이 두 사람을 피해 다니고 있던 이유는…

1100708377.english: ...it was related to my shameful past, and it wasn't the fault of either of them...!
1100708377.korean: …제 부끄러운 과거와 관련이 되어 있던 거고, 두 사람의 잘못이 아니옵니다…!

1100708378.english: Oh, is that so? That's a relief.

1100708379.english: We're colleagues from the same Densetsu, and I was worried I might have caused a big offense...
1100708379.korean: 같은 덴세츠의 동료인데, 혹시나 큰 실례를 저질렀을까봐… 걱정하고 있었거든요.

1100708380.english: ...Hmph, that's not possible. From the very beginning, the reason I thought about becoming a magical girl was...
1100708380.korean: …후후, 그럴 리가요. 애초에, 마법소녀가 되자고 생각한 것도…

1100708381.english: It was because I wanted to approach them comfortably.

1100708383.english: Really, it was a pointless worry.

1100708384.english: ...Seeing Mr. BaekTo, who was softened by hypnosis...
1100708384.korean: …최면에 걸려서 나긋나긋해진 백토 씨를 보다 보니…

1100708385.english: I've figured out how to defeat Mr. Enrai.

1100708386.english: That's right... the commander will face off against Mr. Enrai!
1100708386.korean: 그건 바로… 사령관님이 엔라이 씨와 맞서는 겁니다!

1100708388.english: ...If we use this method, we'll definitely be able to defeat Mr. Enrai. Even tho Mr. Enrai is going berserk because of the Prisma Stick, she hasn't fundamentally become a different person.
1100708388.korean: …이런 방법을 쓰면 분명 엔라이 씨를 쓰러뜨릴 수 있을 겁니다. 엔라이 씨는 프리즈마 스틱 때문에 폭주하고 계시기는 해도, 본질적으로 다른 사람이 된 건 아니니까요.

1100708389.english: Then...! Go, Commander! We're going to take down Mr. Enrai!
1100708389.korean: 그럼…! 가세요, 사령관님! 엔라이 씨를 쓰러뜨리는 겁니다!

1100708390.english: - With the support of Hraesvelgr, I took a step forward and called out to Enrai.
1100708390.korean: - 나는 흐레스벨그의 응원을 받으며, 앞으로 한 걸음 내딛어 엔라이를 불렀다.

1100708392.english: The Magical Gentleman's worries... that's a really big deal.
1100708392.korean: 매지컬 젠틀맨의 고민… 그건 정말 큰 일이군요.

1100708393.english: I will definitely resolve this for you. Alright, then... please share your deepest worries with me.
1100708393.korean: 소첩이 반드시 해결해 드리겠사옵니다. 자아, 그럼… 소첩에게 마음 속 깊은 곳의 고민을… 털어놓아 주시지요.

1100708396.english: Of course... it's true that this humble servant admires the lord, but... this humble servant is a kunoichi, and it is forbidden to harbor feelings for the lord...
1100708396.korean: 무, 물론… 소첩이 주공을 경애하는 것은 사실이나, 그러나… 소첩은 쿠노이치고… 주공에 대한 감정을 품는 건 금지되어 있기에…

1100708398.english: I... I also want to eat parfait with you, my lord...!
1100708398.korean: 소첩도… 소첩도 주공과 함께 파르페를 먹고 싶사옵니다…!

1100708399.english: As a kunoichi and a mother, I am enduring, but... I also truly adore you, my lord...!"
1100708399.korean: 쿠노이치니까, 엄마니까 참고 있지만… 소첩도 주공을 진심으로 사모한단 말이옵니다…!

1100708400.english: - If that's what Enrai means too... then what I had to say was already decided.
1100708400.korean: - 엔라이의 뜻도 그렇다면… 내가 할 말은 하나로 정해져 있었다.

1100708401.english: - I shouted loudly at the kunoichi, who had a more girlish heart than anyone else.
1100708401.korean: - 나는 누구보다도 소녀스러운 마음을 가진 쿠노이치를 향해, 큰 소리로 외쳤다.

1100708402.english: Ah, ahh... Magical Gentleman... no... Master...!
1100708402.korean: 아, 아앗… 매지컬 젠틀맨… 아니… 주공…!

1100708403.english: Um... if you say such things, I... I...! My love and affection for the Lord are overflowing...
1100708403.korean: 그… 그런 말씀을 하시면, 소첩은... 소첩은…! 주공에 대한 애정과 사랑이 넘쳐 흘러서…

1100708404.english: I'll become a magical girl no more...!

1100708405.english: - The moment Enrai declared she was giving up on being a magical girl, there was a 'crack!' from the Prisma Stick. and a chilling cracking sound was heard...
1100708405.korean: - 엔라이가 마법소녀 포기 선언을 하는 순간, 프리즈마 스틱에서 ‘빠각!’ 하고 섬뜩한 파열음이 들려왔고…

1100708406.english: - The Prisma Stick shattered, and Enrai was enveloped in a brilliant light.
1100708406.korean: - 프리즈마 스틱이 산산조각나며 엔라이가 환한 빛에 휩싸였다.

1100708407.english: - And then, Enrai, who had returned to her original form, seemed to have exhausted her energy and collapsed right there.
1100708407.korean: - 그리고, 다시 원래의 모습으로 돌아온 엔라이는 기운이 다한 듯 그대로 자리에 쓰러졌다.

1100708408.english: - ...I swallowed hard, looking at the Prisma stick with only the handle broken.
1100708408.korean: - …나는 손잡이 부분만 부서진 프리즈마 스틱을 보며 꿀꺽 침을 삼켰다.

1100708409.english: - ...This, no matter how I look at it, it just seems like it was broken by hand strength...
1100708409.korean: - …이거, 아무리 봐도 그냥 악력으로 부순 거 같은데…

1100708410.english: - Wasn't that the thing that was fine even after colliding with Moonbit's chainsaw?
1100708410.korean: - 백토의 전기톱이랑 부딪히면서도 멀쩡했던 물건 아닌가?

1100708411.english: - But, the moment I spoke that fact aloud, I had a terrifying feeling that Enrai, who had collapsed, would somehow get back up again...
1100708411.korean: - 하지만, 그 사실을 입 밖으로 내는 순간, 왠지 쓰러졌던 엔라이가 다시 일어날 것 같다는 무시무시한 느낌을 받았기에…

1100708412.english: - I decided to quietly bury the incident in my heart.
1100708412.korean: - 나는 조용히 사건을 내 마음속에 묻어두기로 결정했다.

1100708413.english: I thought that would be the case. If the commander were to reveal their true feelings for Mr. Enrai, Mr. Enrai's emotions would overflow, and the Prisma Stick wouldn't be able to withstand it!
1100708413.korean: 그럴 거라고 생각했습니다. 사령관님께서 엔라이 씨를 향한 진심을 털어놓는다면, 엔라이 씨의 감정이 오버플로우해서, 프리즈마 스틱이 버텨낼 수 없을 거라고요!

1100708414.english: That was truly amazing, gentlemen. To think you could bring Mr. Enrai, who was going berserk because of the Prisma Stick, back to the side of justice with just a few words...
1100708414.korean: 정말 대단했습니다, 젠틀맨. 프리즈마 스틱 때문에 폭주하던 엔라이 씨를 몇 마디 말로 다시 정의의 편으로 돌려놓다니…

1100708415.english: I felt like I still had a long way to go.
1100708415.korean: 아직 갈 길이 멀다는 걸 느꼈어요.

1100708416.english: - Okay, well, the more the merrier.
1100708416.korean: - 그래, 뭐 좋은 게 좋은 거지.

1100708417.english: This Prisma Stick... I'll retrieve it and hand it over to Orca's Magical Support Team.
1100708417.korean: 이 프리즈마 스틱은… 회수해서 오르카의 매지컬 서포트 팀에게 넘기도록 할게요.

1100708419.english: If we purify only the evil magic that controls Master, the power within it could be used beneficially...
1100708419.korean: 주인을 멋대로 휘두르는 사악한 마법만 정화한다면, 그 안에 담긴 힘은 유용하게 사용할 수 있을 테고...

1100708421.english: ...because it would be a necessary item for anyone who wants to be a magical girl with us.
1100708421.korean: …우리와 함께 마법소녀 활동을 하고 싶은 사람에게는 필요한 물건일 테니까요.

1100708422.english: - A few days after the Enrai incident.
1100708422.korean: - 엔라이 사건이 있고 나서 며칠 후.

1100708423.english: - Orca's Magical Support Team... in other words, Orca's Technical Department... recovered the Prisma Stick and removed its hypnosis function, and Moonbit declared that the evil magic residing within the Prisma Stick had been purified.
1100708423.korean: - 오르카의 매지컬 서포트 팀… 즉 오르카 기술부는 프리즈마 스틱을 회수해 최면 기능을 제거했고, 백토는 프리즈마 스틱에 깃들어 있던 사악한 마법이 정화되었음을 선포했다.

1100708425.english: - Moonbit handed the Prisma Stick to Enrai, a villain who was trying to steal 40 cakes, and sentenced her to magical community service.
1100708425.korean: - 백토는 케이크 40개를 훔치려던 극악무도한 악당, 엔라이에게 프리즈마 스틱을 건네며 매지컬 사회봉사형을 선고했다.

1100708426.english: - It was a punishment to become a magical girl and attend volunteer activities and special training every weekend with BaekTo and Momo.
1100708426.korean: - 마법소녀가 되어 백토, 모모와 함께 주말마다 봉사활동과 특별 수련을 다니는 형벌이었다.

1100708427.english: ...It's a bit disappointing that I can't practice ninjutsu on the weekends, but...
1100708427.korean: …주말에 인법 수련을 하지 못하는 것은 조금 아쉬운 일이지만…

1100708428.english: Thanks to you, I was able to become friends with the magical girls.
1100708428.korean: 덕분에 마법소녀 분들과 친해질 수 있었사옵니다.

1100708429.english: Anyway, thanks to the Prisma Stick, my worries have been resolved.
1100708429.korean: 어쨌거나 프리즈마 스틱 덕분에 소첩의 고민이 해결된 셈이지요.

1100708430.english: - "I'm here to submit the report on my volunteer work results," said Enrai with a smile.
1100708430.korean: - 봉사활동 결과 레포트를 제출하러 온 엔라이가 웃으며 말했다.

1100708431.english: ...Anyway... I am grateful that you prevented me from causing a major accident.
1100708431.korean: …어쨌거나… 소첩이 큰 사고를 칠 뻔한 것을 막아주셔서 감사드리옵니다.

1100708432.english: I have caused you great trouble, my lord.

1100708433.english: Sigh... Anyway, there's no problem with the volunteer work, but a magical girl?
1100708433.korean: 하아… 그나저나, 봉사활동에는 문제가 없지만, 마법소녀라니.

1100708434.english: Heh heh, I must look quite ridiculous. To act so childish and foolish at that age...
1100708434.korean: 후후, 소첩의 꼴이 우습사옵니다. 나잇값도 못하고, 주책이나 부리는 꼴이라니…

1100708435.english: ...Lord, did you have a magical girl preference?

1100708436.english: - When Enrai is wearing the magical girl costume, even tho she's always blushing...
1100708436.korean: - 마법소녀 코스튬을 입고 있을 때의 엔라이는, 항상 부끄러운 표정을 짓고 있기는 해도…

1100708437.english: - Because they looked happy and free.

1100708439.english: ...If the Lord says so... I, your humble servant, will continue to work as a magical girl from now on.
1100708439.korean: …주공께서 그렇게 말씀하신다면… 소첩, 앞으로도 계속 마법소녀 일을 하도록 하겠사옵니다.

1100708440.english: Actually... I said I was being foolish, but...
1100708440.korean: 사실… 주책을 부린다고 말을 하긴 했사오나…

1100708441.english: I also enjoyed being a magical girl.
1100708441.korean: 소첩 또한 마법소녀 일을 하는 것이 즐거웠사옵니다.

1100708442.english: It was also fun spending time with Moonbit and Momo, and most of all...
1100708442.korean: 백토, 모모와 함께 시간을 보내는 것도 즐거웠고, 무엇보다도…

1100708443.english: Because it was a time when I could be honest with my heart.
1100708443.korean: 소첩의 마음에 솔직해질 수 있는 시간이었기 때문이옵니다.

1100708444.english: And, also... my feelings for the Lord...
1100708444.korean: 그리고, 또… 주공을 향한 소첩의 마음 또한…

1100708445.english: Because it was a time when we could speak honestly.

1100708446.english: You are the one who always guides this unworthy servant and supports me whenever I falter.
1100708446.korean: 주공께서는 항상 불민한 소첩을 이끌어 주시고, 소첩이 흔들릴 때마다 지지해주시는 분.

1100708447.english: I have always held feelings of gratitude and... love for you, my lord.
1100708447.korean: 소첩, 항상 주공께 감사한 마음과… 사랑을 품고 있었사옵니다.

1100708448.english: However, being a kunoichi... not being allowed to have feelings for her master... she dared not express those feelings, but...
1100708448.korean: 허나, 쿠노이치이기에… 주인을 향한 마음을 가져서는 안 되기에… 감히 그 마음을 표현할 수 없었으나…

1100708449.english: When you're active as a magical girl, don't you think you don't have to be bound by such rules?
1100708449.korean: 마법소녀로 활동할 때에는 그런 규칙에 얽매이지 않아도 되는 것 아니옵니까.

1100708450.english: Isn't it alright to express my love for the Lord freely?
1100708450.korean: 주공을 향한 사랑을… 마음껏 표현해도 괜찮은 것 아니겠사옵니까.

1100708451.english: That's why I was happy to become a magical girl.

1100708452.english: - Enrai, who had been reluctant to directly express her feelings...
1100708452.korean: - 직접적으로 자신의 감정을 이야기해주지 않으려 하던 엔라이가…

1100708453.english: - Because it's the first time they've told me their feelings.
1100708453.korean: - 처음으로 내게 자신의 마음을 들려준 거니까.

1100708456.english: - Enrai took out her Prisma Stick and transformed into a magical girl.
1100708456.korean: - 엔라이는 프리즈마 스틱을 꺼내, 마법소녀로 변신했다.

1100708457.english: A little more, it would be alright to be honest with my feelings, wouldn't it?
1100708457.korean: 조금 더, 소첩의 마음에 솔직해져도… 괜찮겠지요?

1100708458.english: To Moonbit, I have heard about the third ritual.
1100708458.korean: 백토에게, 세 번째 의식에 대해 들었사옵니다.

1100708459.english: Together, would you not perform the third ritual...?
1100708459.korean: 함께, 세 번째 의식을… 치르지 않으시겠사옵니까?

1100708460.english: - The true feelings of a shy and bashful magical girl, who finally found the courage to speak.
1100708460.korean: - 부끄러움과 수줍음이 가득한 마법소녀가, 용기를 내어 말해준 진심.

1100708461.english: - How could I possibly refuse her sincerity?
1100708461.korean: - 내가 어찌 감히 그 진심을 거부할 수 있겠는가?

1100708462.english: - To repay Enrai's sincerity, I decided to show my feelings as they are, without hiding them...
1100708462.korean: - 나는 엔라이의 진심에 보답하기 위해, 내 감정을 숨기는 것 없이 그대로 보여주기로 했고…

1100708463.english: - We held the third ceremony, being completely honest with each other.
1100708463.korean: - 우리는 서로에게 가장 솔직한 모습으로 세 번째 의식을 치뤘다.

1100708464.english: - A few days later, while I was having a late breakfast in the cafeteria... Clover, looking extremely excited, placed her tray in front of me.
1100708464.korean: - 며칠 뒤, 카페테리아에서 늦은 아침을 먹던 중… 잔뜩 신난 표정의 클로버가 내 앞에 식판을 내려놓았다.

1100708467.english: Well, it seems Assault is producing a new magical girl series this time.
1100708467.korean: 글쎄, 어썰트가 이번에 새로운 마법소녀 시리즈를 제작했다는 거야.

1100708468.english: And the name of that magical girl series is...

1100708470.english: - So that's what the special training we did every weekend was.
1100708470.korean: - 과연, 주말마다 하던 특별 수련이 이거였나.

1100708471.english: Since they're airing the pilot episode, let's watch it together. Since Mr. Enrai is the main character, it's sure to be fun.
1100708471.korean: 마침 파일럿 에피소드를 방영한다니까, 같이 보자. 엔라이 씨가 주인공으로 나온다니, 분명 재밌을 거야.

1100708472.english: Oh, the opening song is starting just in time. Listen!
1100708472.korean: 아, 마침 오프닝 노래 나온다. 들어봐!

1100708473.english: - N-Light, singing the opening song with a slightly awkward but joyful expression.
1100708473.korean: - 약간은 어색하지만, 즐거운 표정으로 오프닝곡을 부르는 엔라이.

1100708474.english: - Watching that scene, the following thought suddenly came to mind.
1100708474.korean: - 그 모습을 보며, 나는 갑자기 이런 생각이 떠올랐다.

1100708475.english: - ...Maybe, I might actually be into magical girls.

1100708478.english: It's something you prepared for me, but I can't do that...
1100708478.korean: 날 위해 준비한 건데, 그럴 수는 없잖아…

1100708480.english: It feels like I'm intruding on a family gathering.

1100708483.english: A lot has happened while I wasn't paying attention.
1100708483.korean: 내가 모르는 사이에 많은 일들이 벌어졌구나.

1100708484.english: ...Don't overdo the gold plating. Because I'm embarrassed.

1100708485.english: Enrai? Why are you doing this here?

1100708490.english: Then we should talk more and get used to each other.
1100708490.korean: 그러면 더 대화를 하면서 서로에게 익숙해져야지.

1100708492.english: It's just that my legs were hurting anyway.

1100708494.english: You want to party with Enrai.
1100708494.korean: 엔라이랑 같이 파티를 즐기고 싶은 거야.

1100708495.english: If you have any worries like that, feel free to talk to me anytime.

1100708496.english: It seems you're feeling a bit better now, right?

1100708498.english: ...You know your military drill name isn't that, right?

1100708500.english: ... I think the method is the problem.

1100708501.english: Think about all the things you've done so far.

1100708502.english: Both of those are things Enrai doesn't like much.
1100708502.korean: 둘 다 엔라이가 별로 안 좋아하는 것들이잖아.

1100708503.english: There's no help for it. Since it's come to this...
1100708503.korean: 어쩔 수 없지. 이렇게 된 이상…

1100708504.english: It creates a sense of empathy.

1100708505.english: Hraesvelgr, what is the current target's location?

1100708506.english: Hey, it's not good to say unlucky things.

1100708509.english: If it's the item in the technical department's warehouse...

1100708515.english: Oh, clover. Coming in while I'm washing is rude, isn't it?
1100708515.korean: 이런, 클로버. 씻는 중에 들어오다니, 실례잖니.

1100708517.english: Maybe... do you want to shower together?

1100708519.english: Then, if I just deal with that stick...

1100708521.english: Wait a minute, wait a minute! Don't achieve enlightenment yet!

1100708527.english: I'm sad because I've been spending less time with Enrai lately!
1100708527.korean: 최근 엔라이랑 같이 보내는 시간이 줄어서 슬퍼!

1100708528.english: I want to go eat parfait with Enrai!
1100708528.korean: 엔라이랑 같이 파르페를 먹으러 가고 싶어!

1100708529.english: You're a magical girl now! So, tell me your honest feelings!
1100708529.korean: 지금은 마법소녀잖아! 그러니, 솔직한 감정을 말해줘!

1100708531.english: Let's go on a date, Enrai!!

1100708536.english: I also like Enrai, the magical girl.

1100708538.english: It's okay if you don't want to do it.

1100708545.english: They say the one who falls in love first loses. Hahaha! Then, in this match... I lost. Because I was already in love with the commander a long time ago. But it was a thrilling match. You're not going to end this thrill here, are you? I'm not satisfied with just any kind of thrill. You know what I mean, right?
1100708545.korean: 먼저 반하면 지는 거라고 했는데 말이야. 캬하핫! 그러면 이 승부… 내가 졌네. 이미 한참 전에 사령관에게 반해있었으니까. 하지만 짜릿한 승부였어. 이 짜릿함을 여기서 끝내지는 않겠지? 나는 어지간한 짜릿함으로는 만족 못 한다고. 무슨 말인지… 알지?

1100708546.english: Haha, this... I've really hit a career high as a pirate. To think I stole the Commander's heart. Even the legendary pirates couldn't have stolen something as incredible as I did, could they? Well... still, don't worry too much about being captured by a pirate, Commander. I'm totally head over heels for you, too.
1100708546.korean: 하핫, 이거... 내 해적으로서의 커리어 하이를 찍어버렸네. 사령관의 마음을 훔치다니 말이야. 전설 속의 해적들도 나만큼 엄청난 걸 훔치지는 못했을 걸? 뭐... 그래도 해적한테 잡혔다고 해서 너무 걱정하진 마, 사령관. 나도 사령관한테 홀딱 빠졌거든.

1100708548.english: … Captain! Invincible Dragon Captain! Were in trouble! The AGS are coming!
1100708548.korean: …대장님! 무용 대장님! 큰일났어요! AGS들이 몰려오고 있어요!

1100708549.english: The affiliation is PECS… The number is… at least one thousand and five hundred!
1100708549.korean: 소속은 PECS… 수는… 낮게 잡아도 천오백 이상입니다!

1100708550.english: … I have already confirmed it to some extent.

1100708551.english: Wouldn't it be better to let the ship sail?

1100708552.english: That can't be. Sonia, the Dutch girl, and Alcyone haven't returned yet.
1100708552.korean: 그럴 수는 없소. 소니아와 더치걸, 그리고 알키오네가 아직 돌아오지 않았으니.

1100708553.english: … Ugh, that's right. Those three, they went out to work today because they thought the tunnel construction would be finished if they just worked…
1100708553.korean: …으윽, 맞다. 그 셋, 오늘만 작업하면 터널 공사가 끝난다고 작업하러 나갔었지…

1100708554.english: … Eight, there's nothing I can do! In times like this, Ill go rescue you myself, Poseidon style!
1100708554.korean: …에잇, 어쩔 수 없다! 이럴 때는 포세이돈 스타일로, 제가 직접 구출하러 갈게요!

1100708555.english: No, I will go myself. It will be faster that way.
1100708555.korean: 아니, 소관이 직접 가겠소. 그 편이 더 빠를 테니.

1100708556.english: Yes? But then who will be conducting…!
1100708556.korean: 네? 하지만, 그러면 지휘는 누가 하고요…!

1100708557.english: Isn't that why there's an adjutant in case something like that happens?
1100708557.korean: 그럴 때를 대비해서 부관이 있는 것 아니겠소?

1100708558.english: Yes? An adjutant? Who is that…

1100708560.english: Merlin, the court has confidence in your abilities. You were able to defend yourself against an overwhelming number of Metal Parasites in Britain, and even lured Chief Inspector Leanne into a trap.
1100708560.korean: 멀린, 소관은 그대의 능력을 신뢰하고 있소. 영국에서 압도적인 물량의 철충을 상대로도 방어전을 펼칠 정도였으며, 리앤 총경마저 함정에 빠뜨렸을 정도니까.

1100708561.english: Uh… That back part wasn't actually intentional.
1100708561.korean: 어… 뒤쪽 그건 사실 의도한 건 아니었는데요.

1100708562.english: … That, is that so? Well… Anyway… Didn't you get excellent scores in the tactical simulation too?
1100708562.korean: …그, 그렇소? 뭐… 아무튼… 전술 시뮬레이션에서도 뛰어난 점수를 받지 않았소?

1100708563.english: The important thing is that your commanding ability is definitely outstanding. This is something that the lord and other commanders of Black River have acknowledged, so have confidence in yourself.
1100708563.korean: 중요한 건 그대의 지휘 능력이 확실히 뛰어나다는 것이오. 주군이나 블랙리버의 다른 지휘관들도 인정한 사실이니, 자신감을 가지도록 하시오.

1100708565.english: … There is a saying that a gentleman dies for someone who recognizes him. For this Merlin, Arthur, and the Dance Master, I will risk my life to defend the ship.
1100708565.korean: …선비는 자신을 알아주는 사람을 위해 죽는다는 말이 있죠. 이 멀린, 아서와 무용 대장님을 위해 목숨 걸고 배를 방어하겠습니다.

1100708566.english: And later, if Gamma-nim keeps bothering you, I'll help you out once.
1100708566.korean: 그리고 나중에 감마님이 자꾸 귀찮게 굴면 제가 한 번 도와드릴게요.

1100708567.english: … the latter offer is quite tempting, but there is no need to risk your life for the sake of the matter.
1100708567.korean: …뒤쪽 제안은 꽤나 끌리긴 하지만, 소관을 위해 목숨까지 걸 필요는 없소.

1100708568.english: With your abilities, you should be able to protect the ship without any danger.
1100708568.korean: 그대의 능력이라면 위험한 일 없이도 충분히 배를 지킬 수 있을 테니까.
