1100708569.english: … Ugh, what day is it today…? The level of compliments is so high that I think I might collapse from diabetes…
1100708569.korean: …으윽, 오늘 무슨 날이지…? 칭찬 농도가 너무 높아서 당뇨병으로 쓰러질 것 같아…

1100708570.english: Okay, Captain! I'll be waiting, so go ahead!!
1100708570.korean: 알겠습니다, 대장님! 기다리고 있을 테니 다녀오세요!!

1100708571.english: … How did you not know this place? There were so many people here…

1100708572.english: … I don't think they came here specifically. It seems like a group of guys who were searching around got lucky and found this place.
1100708572.korean: …정확히 여길 노리고 온 건 아닌 것 같아. 주위를 수색하던 녀석들 중 한 무리가 운 좋게 여길 발견한 것 같은데.

1100708573.english: Alcyone, will you take Dutch to the boat with you?
1100708573.korean: 알키오네, 더치 데리고 배로 가 줄래?

1100708574.english: … No, you cant. If Alcyone leaves, Sonia will have to fend off that many enemies on her own.
1100708574.korean: …아니, 안 돼. 알키오네가 빠지면 소니아 혼자 저 많은 수를 막아야 하잖아.

1100708575.english: I'll stay in the tunnel. You two block the enemies in front.
1100708575.korean: 난 터널 안에 있을게. 두 사람은 앞에서 적들을 막아줘.

1100708577.english: What if the tunnel collapses under attack?
1100708577.korean: 공격을 받아서 터널이 무너지기라도 하면 어쩌려고 그래?

1100708578.english: … Its okay, we can just dig another tunnel…!

1100708579.english: … No, that wont do. We cant risk being buried. But we cant give up on the tunnel either.
1100708579.korean: …아니, 그건 안 돼. 매몰될 위험을 감수할 수는 없어. 그렇다고 터널을 포기할 수도 없지.

1100708581.english: Let's go out and attack first and destroy the enemies in front. Dutch, you wait here, outside the tunnel.
1100708581.korean: 우리가 미리 치고 나가서 앞에서 적들을 섬멸하자. 더치, 너는 여기, 터널 밖에서 기다리고 있어.

1100708583.english: This is exactly the kind of operation I like!

1100708584.english: Oh, do you know what the best way to block enemy attacks is, Sonia?
1100708584.korean: 아, 적의 공격을 차단하는 가장 좋은 방법이 뭔지 알아, 소니아?

1100708585.english: Well, 'killing' the enemy before they attack?
1100708585.korean: 글쎄, 적이 공격하기 전에 미리 적을 ‘처단’하는 거?

1100708587.english: Haha… Alcyone, you'd look great with that curly white haired friend of yours in Orca.
1100708587.korean: 하핫… 알키오네 너, 오르카에 있는 하얀 곱슬머리 친구랑 잘 어울리겠네.

1100708588.english: Anyway, shall we go then? Let's kill some enemies.
1100708588.korean: 아무튼, 그럼 갈까? 적들을 좀 처단하러.

1100708589.english: Okay, let's sweep it all away!

1100708590.english: … It seems like there's no end to the number of attacks. Since there are so many, the barrage of bullets is also something that cant be ignored…
1100708590.korean: …베어도 베어도 끝이 없는 것 같소. 수가 많다 보니 탄막도 무시할 수 없는 수준이고…

1100708591.english: I don't know if I can make it on time like this…
1100708591.korean: 이래서는 시간에 맞출 수 있을 지 모르겠는데…

1100708592.english: Yeah, each one of them is nothing special, but there are so many of them that it's annoying. Right?
1100708592.korean: 그러게, 하나하나는 별 것 아닌데 수가 많아서 좀 짜증나는 놈들이군. 그렇지?

1100708597.english: Why are you being so serious? I'm a victim too. I was attacked while passing by, so it's a bit annoying.
1100708597.korean: 뭘 그렇게 정색하고 그래? 나도 피해자라고. 지나가다가 공격받아서 좀 짜증나는 상황이야.

1100708598.english: … Aren't those AGSs on your side? They have the PECS mark on them.
1100708598.korean: …그대 쪽 AGS들 아니오? PECS 마크가 붙어 있는데.

1100708599.english: If that were the case, I would have immediately returned to the ship and blasted away that cheeky AI that dared attack Master.
1100708599.korean: 그랬으면 내가 당장 배로 돌아가서 감히 주인을 공격하는 시건방진 AI놈을 날려버렸겠지.

1100708600.english: Anyway, you guys aren't AGS either…

1100708601.english: Then there's no need to bother with it.
1100708601.korean: 그럼 굳이 손속을 둘 필요가 없겠군.

1100708603.english: If you're going to make a fuss, at least help pave the way for the authorities.
1100708603.korean: 기왕 한바탕 할 거라면 소관이 길을 뚫는 것이나 좀 거들고 가시오.

1100708604.english: … Huh, you didn't forget that I'm your enemy, did you?
1100708604.korean: …허, 내가 네 적인 걸 잊어버린 건 아니지?

1100708605.english: Of course I know that. But…

1100708606.english: Gamma, I also know very well that you are a great man who would not miss the opportunity to fight back to back with the Sowan like in the old days.
1100708606.korean: 감마, 그대가 옛날처럼 소관과 함께 등을 맞대고 싸울 기회를 놓치지 않을 위인이라는 것도 잘 알고 있지.

1100708608.english: Damn, you know how to turn me on so well that I don't care.
1100708608.korean: 젠장, 전 상관 아니랄까봐 날 설레게 하는 법을 너무 잘 아는군.

1100708609.english: Okay. Let's have a game like we used to.
1100708609.korean: 좋아. 오랜만에 예전처럼 한 판 해 보자고.

1100708610.english: … Then, Ill leave the 3 o'clock direction to you!

1100708611.english: Ha! Sometimes I think that guy is just as stubborn as I am.
1100708611.korean: 하! 가끔 보면 저 녀석도 나만큼이나 막무가내라니까.

1100708612.english: …do it moderately and leave some guys for me to destroy, dragon!
1100708612.korean: …적당히 하고 내가 박살낼 놈들도 좀 남겨둬라, 용!

1100708613.english: Why do we see each other so often?

1100708615.english: What, it looks like this isn't your first time meeting?

1100708617.english: … I was once attacked by AGS patrolling while I was building a tunnel.
1100708617.korean: …전에 한 번 터널을 공사하다가 순찰을 도는 AGS들에게 공격을 받은 적이 있어.

1100708618.english: At that time, I received help from Gamma.

1100708620.english: The third one might not happen, so try not to go to dangerous places.
1100708620.korean: 세 번째는 없을지도 모르니까 위험한 곳에는 되도록 가지 말라고.

1100708621.english: … That kind of sight always feels unfamiliar.

1100708623.english: It got scratched here and there, but it's okay!

1100708624.english: … I was really on the edge.

1100708625.english: By the way… What seems to have happened in the city? The tunnels are filled with water.
1100708625.korean: 그나저나… 도시 안에서 무슨 일이 벌어진 것 같은데? 터널이 물로 가득 차 버렸어.

1100708626.english: Tommy Walker and Dutch worked hard to dig this tunnel, but it's completely submerged... What should we do with this?
1100708626.korean: 토미워커랑 더치가 열심히 판 터널인데, 완전히 수몰된 상태네… 이걸 어쩌면 좋담.

1100708627.english: … I think it would be better to go back to the ship for now.

1100708628.english: We don't know how many more AGS there are, so for now, let's sail out and anchor at a port above Caracas to send troops to Caracas.
1100708628.korean: AGS들이 얼마나 더 있을지 모르니, 일단은 배를 몰고 출항했다가 카라카스 위쪽에 있는 항구에 정박해서 카라카스로 병력을 보내도록 하지.

1100708629.english: Then wouldn't it take too much time?
1100708629.korean: 그러면 시간이 너무 오래 걸리지 않겠어?

1100708630.english: That's true. But I guess there's nothing we can do since the tunnel can't be used.
1100708630.korean: 그렇겠지. 하지만 터널을 쓸 수 없게 되었으니 어쩔 수 없지 않겠소.

1100708633.english: I think I could get into the city through that tunnel.
1100708633.korean: 나라면 저 터널을 통해서 도시 안으로 들어갈 수 있을 것 같은데.

1100708634.english: … wouldn't it be dangerous? The water wouldn't be clean, so visibility would be poor.
1100708634.korean: …위험하지 않겠소? 물이 깨끗하지 않아서 시야도 잘 안 보일 텐데.

1100708635.english: It's okay! I'm a killer whale Bioroid!

1100708636.english: And, when fighting Delta, I've dived into situations more serious than that... Trust me and leave it to me!
1100708636.korean: 그리고, 델타랑 싸울 때는 저것보다 더 심각한 상황에서도 잠수해 봤으니까… 믿고 맡겨줘!

1100708637.english: … Certainly, it is clear that the lord is in a dangerous situation now.
1100708637.korean: …확실히, 주군이 지금 위험한 상황에 놓여 있을 거라는 건 명약관화한 일.

1100708638.english: Okay, I'll allow you to enter. But... if it's dangerous, come back immediately!
1100708638.korean: 알겠소. 진입을 허가하겠소. 하지만… 위험하다면 바로 돌아오도록 하시오!

1100708639.english: Don't worry too much, Captain! I promised my master that I wouldn't get hurt.
1100708639.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마, 대장님! 난 주인님이랑 안 다치기로 약속했거든.

1100708640.english: And… the Guardians series always keeps its promises!
1100708640.korean: 그리고… 가디언 시리즈는 항상 약속을 지키니까!

1100708641.english: Wow, it's a sea of water...

1100708642.english: I somehow managed to get out of the tunnel and onto the overpass… but where do I go now?
1100708642.korean: 터널을 어떻게 빠져나와서 고가도로로 올라가긴 했는데… 이제 어디로 가야 한담.

1100708646.english: Can you pull me up? My boat was destroyed by the shelling and I'm stuck here.
1100708646.korean: 나 좀 끌어올려 주지 않을래? 포격 때문에 보트가 부서져서 여기 갇혀버렸거든.

1100708647.english: Oh… Wait a minute! I'll pull you up right now!
1100708647.korean: 이런… 잠시만 기다려! 당장 끌어올려 줄게!

1100708648.english: Phew, I was really stuck, I guess I'm lucky. Thank you. I'll definitely repay this favor later.
1100708648.korean: 후우, 진짜 꼼짝도 못 하고 있었는데, 운이 좋네. 고마워. 나중에 이 은혜는 꼭 갚을 게.

1100708649.english: What, you don't have to do that! It's only natural to help people in trouble.
1100708649.korean: 뭘, 그럴 필요 없어! 곤경에 빠진 사람을 돕는 건 당연한 일이니까.

1100708650.english: So, what the hell is going on here? Uh… well…
1100708650.korean: 그래서, 대체 여기선 무슨 일이 벌어진 거야? 어… 그러니까…

1100708652.english: You're a shepherd. I'm Alcyone from Orca.

1100708653.english: Back to the main topic… What the hell is going on here? And why are you taking a boat when the city is such a mess?
1100708653.korean: 다시 본론으로 돌아가서… 여기선 대체 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는 거야? 그리고 넌 도시가 이렇게 난장판인데 왜 굳이 보트를 타고 다니는 거고?

1100708654.english: Well, it’s a long story, but to put it simply… It seems your commander didn’t like the city’s interior design. So he opened the dam gates and flooded the city.
1100708654.korean: 뭐, 긴 얘기가 있지만 간단히 요약하자면… 너희 사령관이 도시 인테리어가 마음에 안 들었던 모양이야. 댐 수문을 열어서 도시를 물바다로 만들었거든.

1100708656.english: Haha, I also didn't like the city interior, so don't worry if I have any ill feelings towards it. I don't have any such feelings at all.
1100708656.korean: 하핫, 나도 도시 인테리어가 마음에 안 들었으니까, 혹시나 악감정이라도 품었을까 걱정하진 마. 그런 거 전혀 없거든.

1100708657.english: By the way… You, I saw you earlier and you seemed very strong… Do you fight at all?
1100708657.korean: 그나저나… 너, 아까 보니까 힘이 엄청나던데… 혹시 싸움은 좀 해?

1100708658.korean: 어디 가서 맞고 다닌 적은 없지!

1100708659.english: How good are your swimming skills?

1100708660.english: Don't you see this tail? Of course I'll finish it off!
1100708660.korean: 이 꼬리 안 보여? 당연히 끝내주지!

1100708662.english: … What are you suddenly saying you passed?

1100708663.english: Well… I guess you've earned the right to accompany me for the time being.
1100708663.korean: 그야… 당분간 나랑 동행할 수 있는 자격을 따낸 거지.

1100708665.english: That might not be such a bad idea, after all, I was on my way to rescue your master.
1100708665.korean: 그렇게 나쁜 제안은 아닐 걸? 왜냐면, 내가 마침 너희 주인님을 구하러 가는 중이었거든.

1100708667.english: Yes. I'm sure you came here to help the Commander, so let's go together.
1100708667.korean: 그래. 너도 분명 사령관님을 돕기 위해 여기까지 왔을 텐데, 같이 가자고.

1100708669.english: You're not lying to me, are you?

1100708670.english: … Would you believe me if I showed you a note from Lemonade Alpha?

1100708671.english: … This handwriting… is real. Ugh, sorry.

1100708672.english: Well, it's better to be suspicious once in a while.
1100708672.korean: 뭐, 한 번 정도 의심하는 편이 좋긴 하지.

1100708673.english: Well then, let's go and rescue your master. I'll explain everything as we go.
1100708673.korean: 그럼 어서 너희 주인님을 구하러 가자. 여기서 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는지는… 가면서 전부 설명해 줄게.

1100708678.english: … they avoided being shot, but both suffered a major blow to the back of their heads when they were thrown against the wall.
1100708678.korean: …총상은 피했지만, 둘 다 벽으로 내던져지면서 후두부에 큰 충격을 받았어요.

1100708679.english: I'm having surgery for a cerebral hemorrhage, so I don't think I'll be able to return to work right away.
1100708679.korean: 뇌출혈 증세가 생겨서 수술중이라… 당장 업무에 복귀하기는 힘들 것 같아요.

1100708680.english: That damn Black Lilith, I should have killed her a long time ago…
1100708680.korean: 그 망할 블랙 리리스, 진작 죽였어야 했는데…

1100708681.english: … First of all, please do your best to help the two regain consciousness and recover. I cant afford to lose another sister.
1100708681.korean: …일단 두 사람이 의식을 찾고 회복할 수 있도록 최선을 다 해 주세요. 자매를 또 잃을 수는 없으니까요.

1100708682.english: Commander, are your party heading to the slums?

1100708683.english: Yes. We checked the surveillance cameras, but their tracks suddenly stopped on the way to the slums.
1100708683.korean: 네. 감시카메라로 조사해 봤지만, 빈민가로 향하는 길에서 행적이 뚝 끊겼어요.

1100708684.english: After all, the slums are part of the Siete administration, so we can't touch the surveillance cameras there... so observation is no longer possible.
1100708684.korean: 아무래도 빈민가는 시에테의 관리 구역이라, 그쪽 감시카메라들은 저희가 손쓸 수 없는 영역이고… 그래서 더 이상 관측은 불가능해요.

1100708685.english: … I never thought Siete would get attached to Orca.

1100708686.english: It’s not that strange, really. He was just a kid who was particularly starved for affection. So if you’re even a little bit nice to him, wouldn’t he give you his heart and soul?
1100708686.korean: 그렇게 이상한 일도 아니죠. 걔는 유독 애정에 굶주린 애였으니까. 그러니까 약간만 친절하게 대해줘도, 간이고 쓸개고 다 넘겨주는 거 아니겠어요?

1100708687.english: …What did you do so well that you are saying that?

1100708689.english: Isn't this because you treated her harshly in the first place?
1100708689.korean: 애초에 당신들이 그 애를 가혹하게 대했기 때문에 생긴 일 아닌가요?

1100708690.english: You treated us harshly, we just…

1100708691.english: You didn't even give me a room and made me sleep in the warehouse?

1100708693.english: That's because she can't do her job properly...
1100708693.korean: 그건, 걔가 일을 제대로 못 해서…

1100708694.english: Does that mean you let people sleep in a warehouse?

1100708695.english: In the first place, where did the idea of making people sleep in a warehouse because they can't do their jobs come from? Are you even humans before the destruction?
1100708695.korean: 애초에 일을 못 한다고 창고에서 재운다니, 그게 대체 어디서 나온 발상이죠? 당신들이 멸망 전 인간이라도 되나요?

1100708697.english: That's what I said, right? Those two are incompetent, so you shouldn't leave it to them.
1100708697.korean: 그러게 제가 그랬잖아요? 저 두 사람은 무능력하니까, 둘한테 맡겨 놓으면 안 된다고.

1100708698.english: If you had entrusted me with the Siete, I would never have thought of betraying you.
1100708698.korean: 저한테 시에테를 맡겨 주셨으면 절대 배신할 생각을 하지 않았을 텐데.

1100708699.english: Really? And yet, it seems like all of your city guards have betrayed you?
1100708699.korean: 그래요? 그런 것 치고는 당신 휘하의 시티가드 대원들은 전부 배신한 것 같던데요?
